description.text:
*Job Description (JD)*

*Job Title:* Production Manager

*Qualifications*: M.E. or B.E. in Chemical Engineering

*Experience*: more than 5 Years

*Department:* Production

*Reports To:* Plant Head

*Location:* Block No. 627/A, Near Sahjananad Solar,

Kim-Olpad Road, Vadoli, Ta. Olpad, Surat - 394110

*Anand Bio-Renewable Pvt. Ltd* (ABRPL) is a leading company in the field of waste-to-value path. ABRPL is currently interested in setting up waste processing facilities that will promote a sustainable circular economy through the Waste to Value technologies that aimed to address India’s waste disposal problems in commercially viable ways through the production of Bio-CNG (CBG) and Byproducts Organic Liquid and solid Fertilizer. We are dedicated to promoting sustainable energy solutions and contributing to a greener future. ABRPL has acquired access to a Novel Waste Processing Technology for setting up a biomass & MSW to bio-CNG or Compressed Biogas plants in all over the India.

*Position Summary:*

A *Production Manager* is responsible for planning, coordinating, and controlling manufacturing or production processes to ensure products are produced *efficiently, on time, within budget, and at the required quality standards*. The role focuses on maximizing productivity while minimizing costs, waste, and delays.

*Key Responsibilities:*

* *Strategy Development:*
* Develop and implement procurement strategies aligned with company goals and industry standards.
* Identify opportunities for cost reduction and process improvement.
* *Supplier Management:*
* Establish and maintain strong relationships with key suppliers and vendors.
* Negotiate contracts, terms, and conditions to ensure favourable outcomes for the company.
* Conduct regular performance reviews and manage supplier performance.
* *Sourcing and Procurement:*
* Identify and evaluate potential suppliers and sources for raw materials and equipment.
* Oversee the procurement process, including supplier selection, purchasing, and order management.
* Ensure timely delivery of materials and resolve any issues related to supply disruptions.
* *Compliance and Risk Management:*
* Ensure compliance with company policies, industry regulations, and environmental standards.
* Monitor and manage risks related to procurement activities and supply chain disruptions.
* *Cost Management:*
* Monitor market trends and pricing to make informed purchasing decisions.
* Develop and manage budgets for procurement activities.
* Implement cost-saving initiatives and track savings achieved.
* *Collaboration and Coordination:*
* Work closely with production, engineering, and quality assurance teams to understand material requirements and production schedules.
* Coordinate with logistics and warehouse teams to ensure efficient inventory management and distribution.
* *Reporting and Analysis:*
* Prepare and present regular reports on procurement activities, supplier performance, and cost savings.
* Analyse procurement data to identify trends, opportunities, and areas for improvement.

*Qualifications:*

* Master’s or Bachelor’s degree in Chemical Engineering or a related field.
* Proven experience as a Production Manager or similar role, preferably in the biofuel or energy sector.
* Strong knowledge of production processes, supplier management, and contract negotiation.
* Excellent analytical, negotiation, and communication skills.
* Ability to work effectively in a fast-paced, dynamic environment.

*Desired Skills:*

* Experience with production management & tools
* Knowledge of biofuel production processes and industry regulations.
* Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail.

*Key Result Areas (KRA)*

*1. Production Planning & Target Achievement*

o Effective planning and execution of production activities as per schedules and demand.
o Consistent achievement of production targets with minimal delays.

*2. Operational Efficiency & Productivity*

o Improvement of plant efficiency, capacity utilization, and workflow management.

o Reduction of downtime, wastage, and operational losses.

*3*. *Quality & Process Control*

o Adherence to defined quality standards, SOPs, and process parameters.

o Minimization of defects, deviations, and rework.

*4. Equipment & Downtime Management*

o Coordination with maintenance teams to ensure high equipment availability.

o Reduction of breakdowns and production interruptions.

*5. Safety & Compliance*

o Strict implementation of safety practices, policies, and regulatory requirements.

o Maintenance of a safe and risk-free production environment.

*6. Reporting & Coordination*

o Timely maintenance of production records, reports, and MIS documentation.

o Effective coordination with procurement, maintenance, and laboratory departments.

*Contact/ Connect to us:*

Email: anandbiorenewable@gmail.com

Mo. 981973800

Pay: ₹35,000.00 - ₹50,000.00 per month

Work Location: In person

description.text:
Regional Sales Manager

Department: Sales

Location: MUMBAI

Reports to: National Sales Manager

Industry: Chemical Manufacturing (Eco-Friendly Cleaning Solutions)

About LivExpo

LivExpo Manufacturing is a leading innovator in sustainable chemical solutions, specializing in ecofriendly cleaning products for commercial, industrial, and institutional markets. We are committed to environmental responsibility, customer satisfaction, and technological innovation.

We harness the power of biotechnology to develop non-toxic, biodegradable, and environmentally safe cleaning products, addressing the growing demand for green alternatives in sanitation and maintenance. Our diverse product line serves sectors including healthcare, hospitality, food processing, manufacturing, and facility management.

With a strong commitment to innovation, quality, and sustainability, LivExpo Ventures continues to lead the way in developing next-generation cleaning solutions that are effective, safe for users, and gentle on the environment.

Job Summary

The Regional Sales Manager is responsible for driving sales growth, building strategic relationships, and expanding LivExpo’s market presence within the assigned territory. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in chemical or industrial sales, a passion for sustainability, and proven success in managing a territory-based sales portfolio.

Key Responsibilities
Develop and execute a sales strategy aligned with company goals.
Identify and pursue new business opportunities within commercial, institutional, and industrial markets.
Maintain and grow relationships with existing clients and distributors.
Present and promote LivExpo's eco-friendly cleaning solutions to prospective clients through in-person meetings, product demonstrations, and presentations.
Achieve or exceed quarterly and annual sales targets.
Provide technical knowledge and support for product application and usage.
Monitor market trends, competitor activities, and customer feedback to inform strategy.
Collaborate with internal teams (Marketing, R&D, Customer Service) to ensure customer needs are met.
Prepare accurate sales forecasts, pipeline reports, and territory plans.
Act as a liaison between the customer and the company to resolve issues and close sales.
Consult with department heads to plan and to secure information on products and customer specifications.
Monitor customer preferences to determine the focus of sales efforts.
Qualifications
Bachelor's degree in Business, Chemistry, Environmental Science, or related field.
6+ years of B2B sales experience, preferably in chemical manufacturing or cleaning solutions.
Knowledge of eco-friendly or green-certified products is a strong plus.
Demonstrated success in territory management and client acquisition.
Excellent communication, negotiation, and presentation skills.
Self-motivated, results-driven, and able to work independently.
Valid driver's license and willingness to travel within the territory.

description.text:
Job Description: Quality Control (QC) Head

*Plasma Spray Processor Pvt Ltd* is looking for a high-caliber *Quality Control (QC) Head* to lead our quality department in *Taloja, Navi Mumbai*. As a leader in specialized thermal spray coatings, we require a professional who ensures our processes meet the most stringent aerospace, automotive, and industrial standards.

*Role Overview*

* *Position:* Head of Quality Control (QC)
* *Location:* Taloja, Navi Mumbai
* *Experience:* 8–12 years in Quality Management (specifically in Thermal Spray, Surface Engineering, or Metallurgy)
* *Reporting to:* Plant Head / Managing Director

*Key Responsibilities*

*1. Quality Strategy & Leadership*

* Develop, implement, and maintain the Quality Management System (QMS) in accordance with *ISO 9001* and *AS9100* standards.
* Establish quality protocols for various processes: Plasma Spraying, HVOF, Wire Arc, and Flame Spraying.
* Lead and mentor the QC inspection team, ensuring technical competency in coating evaluation.

*2. Process & Product Inspection*

* Oversee metallurgical laboratory testing, including micro-hardness testing, bond strength testing, and porosity analysis.
* Manage Non-Destructive Testing (NDT) processes and ensure all equipment is calibrated and certified.
* Review and approve Material Test Certificates (MTC) and Final Inspection Reports.

*3. Compliance & Auditing*

* Act as the primary point of contact for customer audits and third-party certification bodies.
* Manage the Internal Audit program and ensure timely closure of Non-Conformance Reports (NCR).
* Implement Corrective and Preventive Actions (CAPA) to eliminate root causes of coating failures or dimensional inaccuracies.

*4. Continuous Improvement*

* Monitor and report on Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) such as rejection rates, rework costs, and customer satisfaction.
* Drive "Zero Defect" initiatives through Lean Manufacturing or Six Sigma methodologies.
* Collaborate with the Production and Sales teams to review technical drawings and feasibility for new projects.

*Technical Skills & Qualifications*

* *Education:* B.E./B.Tech in Metallurgy, Mechanical, or Production Engineering.
* *Expertise:* Deep understanding of thermal spray materials (ceramics, carbides, alloys) and coating characterization.
* *Standards:* Expertise in *AS9100* (Aerospace) or *IATF 16949* (Automotive) is highly preferred.
* *Lab Skills:* Hands-on experience with metallographic sample preparation and microscope analysis.
* *Certifications:* ASNT Level II (UT/MPT/LPT) or NACE/SSPC certifications are a significant advantage.

*Candidate Profile*

* Strong leadership and decision-making capabilities under pressure.
* A "quality-first" mindset with extreme attention to detail.
* Excellent communication skills for handling high-profile client technical queries.
* Local to Navi Mumbai or willing to relocate to the Taloja industrial belt.

Pay: ₹30,000.00 - ₹45,000.00 per month

Work Location: In person

employer.briefDescription: Bosch is a leading IoT company and global supplier of technology and services in the Mobility Solutions, Industrial Technology, Consumer Goods, and Energy and Building Technology sectors.

occupations.MGTWW: Business Management, Administrative & Customer Support Occupations

description.text:
Company Description

Company Description

The Bosch Group is a leading global supplier of technology and services, in the areas of Automotive Technology, Industrial Technology, Consumer Goods, Energy and Building Technology.
In India, the Group operates through nine companies with a combined strength of over 30,000 associates which includes around 14,000 research and development associates.
Bosch Rexroth AG is one of the world's leading specialists in the field of drive and control technologies. Under the brand name of Rexroth the company supplies customers with tailored solutions for driving, controlling and moving - for industrial applications and factory automation, mobile applications and using renewable energies.
Bosch Rexroth India Pvt. Ltd. is 100% subsidiary of Bosch Rexroth AG, having Sales Turnover of around INR 2000 Crores in 2024 & Head office & Plant at Sanand, Ahmedabad.
We invite promising and dynamic professionals for a long-term and rewarding career with Bosch.

“The Bosch Group is a globally recognized provider of technology and services, excelling in Automotive Technology, Industrial Technology, Consumer Goods, Energy, and Building Technology. With a strong presence in India, the Group operates through nine companies and boasts an impressive workforce of over 400,000 associates, including approximately 20,000 dedicated to research and development. Among its subsidiaries, Bosch Rexroth AG stands out as a leading expert in drive and control technologies. Changing scenes on the theatre, production lines that automatically adapt to new products in the factory of the future, always sufficient power for moving slice gates that weigh several metric tons, and mobile machines conquering narrow forest trails or the largest construction sites in the world: Creating movement is our driving force.

As a global partner, Bosch Rexroth stands by mechanical and plant engineering challenges worldwide, armed with cutting-edge technology and unparalleled industry expertise. With a dedicated workforce of over 32,300 employees, we strive to deliver safe, efficient, intelligent, and powerful solutions. Our team excels in enabling cost-effective production of small batch sizes and optimizing energy consumption while boosting productivity. Equipped with a diverse cross-technology portfolio, digital services, and comprehensive support, we are committed to being your ultimate partner for machines and plants. With us, movement is synonymous with success. WE MOVE. YOU WIN.

As a subsidiary of Bosch Rexroth AG, Bosch Rexroth India is not just a leading provider of drive and control technologies; it is also a fantastic place to build a rewarding career. With its strong commitment to employee development and well-being, Bosch Rexroth India creates an environment that fosters growth, innovation, and collaboration with proven track record of turnover of 1300cr+. The company values its talented workforce and provides ample opportunities for learning and advancement, with a focus on promoting a healthy work-life balance. As part of the Bosch Group, Bosch Rexroth India benefits from the global organization's resources and expertise, allowing employees to be a part of groundbreaking projects and cutting-edge technologies. Furthermore, the company's inclusive and diverse culture encourages creativity and teamwork, making it a great place for professionals seeking a dynamic and fulfilling work experience. At Bosch Rexroth India, employees are not only part of a renowned organization but also empowered to make a real impact in driving the future of technology and engineering. WE MOVE. YOU WIN.”

Job Description

Project Management:

Lead and drive global R&D engineering projects for the new product development and ratio topics.
Plan project resources and timeline as per the project agreement.
Conduct project quality gate meetings with project team and steering committee.
Execution, monitoring, reporting and escalation to achieve project objectives (quality, cost, time).
Collaborate with global cross-functions at international locations to ensure seamless project execution.
Ensure adherence to product development processes and documentation standards.
Support process management and user administration topics within R&D area.

Engineering Excellence:

 Assist in organizing workshops and making engineering strategy.
Support for implementation, tracking and reporting of defined strategy.
Prepare reports for evaluation of engineering goals and defined targets.
Drive the 5S principles, HSE, compliance and engineering excellence topics in the department.
Drive, track and report the CIP and cost reduction topics in the department.
Drive initiatives for Digitalization, high performance and innovation culture.
Improve Engineering process efficiency and facilitate efficient resource allocation
Standardize best practices across engineering teams within department.
Support competence management topics in department.

Qualifications

1 Job Title / Designation:
Executive (Project Management & Engineering Excellence)
2 Location:AhmP, Ahmedabad
3 Essential Educational Qualification:B.E. - Mechanical Engineering / Mechatronics
4 Preferred Educational Qualification:
5 No. of years of Experience required:2 to 5 years (min. 3 yrs relevant experience in project management)

Additional Information

Knowledge / Specialization / Experience / Expertise required in the areas like:

Must (relevant experience)

Must
 At least 3 years of experience in engineering project management.
 Good English communication and collaboration skills.
 Cross functional experience with engineering, manufacturing and quality dept etc.
 Proficient in project planning, execution, and monitoring, with a keen eye for detail and cost management.
 Knowledge of product development process and documentation standards.
 Experience conducting quality gate meetings.
 Proficient MS Office user (Word, Excel, PowerPoint) Outlook (proficient email writing)
 Data analytics tools like MS Excel & Power BI.
 Experience with organizing workshop, driving topics for decision making.
 Good English communication and presentation skills.
 Project management skills (planning, organizing, drive and reporting etc.)
Advantage with
 Experience in engineering / R&D department.
 Knowledge of Hydraulic products.

Advantage with
 Experience in engineering / R&D department.
 Knowledge of Hydraulic products.

Type of Industry Preferred: Engineering services, R&D organizations, Manufacturing

We invite promising and dynamic professionals for a long-term and rewarding career with Bosch.

“The Bosch Group is a globally recognized provider of technology and services, excelling in Automotive Technology, Industrial Technology, Consumer Goods, Energy, and Building Technology. With a strong presence in India, the Group operates through nine companies and boasts an impressive workforce of over 400,000 associates, including approximately 20,000 dedicated to research and development. Among its subsidiaries, Bosch Rexroth AG stands out as a leading expert in drive and control technologies. Changing scenes on the theatre, production lines that automatically adapt to new products in the factory of the future, always sufficient power for moving slice gates that weigh several metric tons, and mobile machines conquering narrow forest trails or the largest construction sites in the world: Creating movement is our driving force.

As a global partner, Bosch Rexroth stands by mechanical and plant engineering challenges worldwide, armed with cutting-edge technology and unparalleled industry expertise. With a dedicated workforce of over 32,300 employees, we strive to deliver safe, efficient, intelligent, and powerful solutions. Our team excels in enabling cost-effective production of small batch sizes and optimizing energy consumption while boosting productivity. Equipped with a diverse cross-technology portfolio, digital services, and comprehensive support, we are committed to being your ultimate partner for machines and plants. With us, movement is synonymous with success. WE MOVE. YOU WIN.

As a subsidiary of Bosch Rexroth AG, Bosch Rexroth India is not just a leading provider of drive and control technologies; it is also a fantastic place to build a rewarding career. With its strong commitment to employee development and well-being, Bosch Rexroth India creates an environment that fosters growth, innovation, and collaboration with proven track record of turnover of 1300cr+. The company values its talented workforce and provides ample opportunities for learning and advancement, with a focus on promoting a healthy work-life balance. As part of the Bosch Group, Bosch Rexroth India benefits from the global organization's resources and expertise, allowing employees to be a part of groundbreaking projects and cutting-edge technologies. Furthermore, the company's inclusive and diverse culture encourages creativity and teamwork, making it a great place for professionals seeking a dynamic and fulfilling work experience. At Bosch Rexroth India, employees are not only part of a renowned organization but also empowered to make a real impact in driving the future of technology and engineering. WE MOVE. YOU WIN.”

Project Management:

  • Plan project resources and timeline as per the project agreement.
  • Conduct project quality gate meetings with project team and steering committee.
  • Execution, monitoring, reporting and escalation to achieve project objectives (quality, cost, time).
  • Collaborate with global cross-functions at international locations to ensure seamless project execution.
  • Ensure adherence to product development processes and documentation standards.

Engineering Excellence:

  • Drive, track and report the CIP and cost reduction topics in the department.

*Job Description – Zonal Head (Sales)*

*Position: Business Development Manager*

*Experience: 5–8 Years*

*Industry: IT Sales / Technology / ERP Solutions*

*Location: Remote*

*Job Overview*

We are looking for a result-oriented Business Development Manager (BDM) responsible

for managing the complete sales cycle—from lead conversion to deal closure. The ideal

candidate will have strong client-handling skills and a proven ability to drive revenue growth.

*Key Responsibilities*

● Conduct product demos and client presentations

● Prepare, share, and follow up on client proposals

● Handle commercial discussions and deal closures

● Plan and execute client visits, maintaining detailed reports

● Coordinate product pilots and technical discussions with internal teams

● Work closely with BDEs for lead qualification and conversion

● Maintain and regularly update CRM systems and sales pipeline

● Achieve assigned sales targets and revenue goals

*Key Requirements*

● 5–7 years of experience in direct sales and client handling

● Proven track record of closing deals and achieving targets

● Strong communication, negotiation, and presentation skills

● Familiarity with CRM tools and reporting systems

● Self-driven, proactive, and result-oriented mindset

● Willingness to travel for client meetings and business development activities

*Preferred Qualifications*

● Experience in IT / ERP / SaaS sales

● Ability to understand client requirements and propose suitable solutions

● Strong relationship-building and account management skills

*What We Offer*

● Competitive salary with performance incentives

● Opportunity to work with a growing and innovative organization

● Exposure to advanced ERP and technology solutions

● Supportive and collaborative work environment

Benefits:
* Cell phone reimbursement

Work Location: Remote

description.text:
Job Description

Job Title: Solutions Architect - Frontier Operations - India
City: Hyderabad
State/Province: Telangana
Posting Start Date: 5/4/26
Job Description:

About the Role

We are seeking a deeply technical, commercially minded Solutions Architect to serve as the technical tip of the spear in our go-to-market motion.You are the strategist who designs the blueprint and wins the deal.

You will partner directly with leading AI labs to understand their cutting-edge model training needs, translating complex technical requirements into scalable, executable solutions. You will be responsible for expanding our capabilities, leading technical sales conversations, and ensuring we not only win high-stakes deals but set our delivery teams up for absolute success.

Core Responsibilities

Pre-Sales & Deal Execution

Technical Sales Leadership: Act as the primary technical expert in client-facing pitches. Partner with the Sales team to uncover client needs, navigate complex technical objections, and close enterprise deals.

Solution Design: Architect end-to-end data pipelines and human-in-the-loop (HITL) workflows tailored to specific AI models (e.g., RLHF, multimodal data generation, red-teaming).

RFx Management: Own the technical response strategy for RFPs, RFIs, and security questionnaires. Craft compelling, highly detailed, and accurate technical proposals under tight deadlines.

Pitch & Collateral Creation: Design highly polished pitch decks, architectural diagrams, and case studies that clearly articulate our value proposition and technical superiority to AI researchers and engineering leaders.

Capability Research & Innovation

R&D / Frontier Tech: Constantly research the bleeding edge of AI (e.g., agentic workflows, complex reasoning models, synthetic data).

Design New Offerings: Translate industry trends into actionable new business capabilities. Work out how we can source, tool, and operationalize new types of data collection before our clients even ask for it.

Proof of Concepts (PoCs): Build and oversee small-scale pilot programs to prove out new capabilities, demonstrating viability to clients before scaling up.

Cross-Functional Alignment

The Handoff: Ensure a seamless, airtight transition from the sales cycle (what we promised) to the Project Leaders (what we must execute).

Product Partnership: Act as the voice of the customer. Aggregate market demands and technical roadblocks, feeding them back to our Product and Engineering teams to influence the platform roadmap.

What We’re Looking For

Experience (Required): Strictly 5+ years of experience directly in an AI/ML Solutions Architecture, Pre-Sales Engineering, or highly technical client-facing role. You must have a proven track record of selling and scoping complex AI or data operations solutions.

Technical Fluency: Deep, practical understanding of modern AI paradigms (LLMs, Generative AI, Computer Vision, RLHF). You need to hold your own in a room full of PhD-level AI researchers.

Commercial Acumen: You possess the "sales gene." You know how to read a room, tie technical features to business outcomes, and drive revenue.

Exceptional Communicator: You are equally adept at whiteboarding complex system architectures, writing flawless RFP responses, and delivering charismatic pitch presentations.

Builder's Mindset: You are not just selling off a menu; you are designing the menu. You enjoy building new capabilities from scratch.

The Reality of the Role

We believe in absolute transparency about what it takes to succeed here:

The Stakes: You will be scoping deals worth millions of dollars. Your architectures must be grounded in operational reality, if you sell a solution that breaks physics, our delivery team will fail.

The Pace: The AI landscape changes weekly. You will frequently be asked to design solutions for model-training techniques that didn't exist six months ago.

The Balance: This is a hybrid role requiring intense context-switching. You might spend the morning writing a technical RFP, the afternoon pitching a top-tier AI lab, and the evening testing a new prompt-engineering capability.

Growth Path

Solutions Architects who consistently drive revenue and pioneer new capabilities can advance to Principal Solutions Architect roles, handling our largest strategic accounts, or transition into Head of Solutions , managing teams of SAs across global markets.

description.text:
The Production Head will be the single-point accountability owner for all manufacturing operations, This leadership role demands a hands-on professional who can drive production planning, inventory optimization, cost control, ERP management (SAP), workshop maintenance, and safety compliance. The incumbent will ensure that Top Management receives timely, accurate, and reliable production and costing data to support strategic decision-making.

Key Responsibilities

A. Production Planning & Execution

Develop and execute monthly, weekly, and daily production plans for manufacturing units in coordination with sales and dispatch teams.

Monitor production output against targets and take corrective actions to minimize deviations, bottlenecks, and downtime.

Ensure on-time delivery of finished goods as per customer requirements and sales commitments.

Implement and oversee lean manufacturing practices to maximize productivity and reduce waste.

Coordinate with the design and engineering teams for new product introduction and process development.

B. Inventory Management

Maintain optimal inventory levels of raw materials, work-in-progress (WIP), consumables, spare parts, and finished goods across all units.

Implement inventory control policies to minimize dead stock, overstocking, and material shortages.

Conduct regular physical stock verification and reconciliation with SAP data.

Coordinate with the Purchase Department for timely procurement based on production schedules and reorder levels.

Track and report inventory turnover ratios and material utilization efficiency.

C. Cost Control & Costing

Monitor and control production costs including material, labour, overheads, power, and consumables.

Prepare and present monthly cost analysis reports highlighting variances against budgets and standard costs.

Identify and implement cost reduction initiatives without compromising quality or delivery timelines.

Establish standard costing for all products and regularly review Bill of Materials (BOM) accuracy.

Ensure accurate allocation of job-wise and unit-wise costs for management review.

Generate and validate production reports, MIS, and costing reports from SAP for management review.

E. Multi-Unit Operations Management

Manage day-to-day production activities across manufacturing units .

Ensure standardization of processes, quality standards, and SOPs across all units.

Allocate and balance workload and manpower across units based on order priority and capacity.

Conduct regular unit visits and production review meetings to ensure alignment with targets.

Handle inter-unit material movement and resource sharing efficiently.

F. Workshop Maintenance & Safety

Develop and enforce preventive maintenance schedules for all CTL, Slotted Angle, Z purlin roll forming machine Slitting machines, and equipment.

Minimize unplanned breakdowns through TPM (Total Productive Maintenance) practices.

Ensure compliance with workplace safety norms, fire safety regulations, and factory act requirements.

Conduct regular safety audits, drills, and training programs for all shop floor personnel.

Maintain clean, organized, and 5S-compliant workshop environments across all units.

G. Team Leadership & People Management

Lead, mentor, and develop production supervisors, unit managers, and shop floor teams.

Manage workforce planning including shift scheduling, overtime management, and contract labour coordination.

Foster a culture of continuous improvement, discipline, and ownership across all units.

H. Reporting & MIS

Present daily, weekly, and monthly production reports to Top Management with accurate data from SAP .

Report on key metrics: OEE, machine utilization, rejection rates, production vs. plan variance, cost per unit, and delivery performance.

Provide real-time escalation on critical issues such as machine breakdowns, quality failures, material shortages, or safety incidents.

Pay: ₹40,000.00 - ₹55,373.14 per month

Benefits:
* Commuter assistance
* Health insurance
* Leave encashment
* Paid sick time
* Paid time off
* Provident Fund

Work Location: In person

Designation of the Manager

09th Mar 2022

1) Job Purpose: Write the purpose for which the job exists (in 2-3 lines) (Max 1325 Characters)

The purpose of this job is:

Review STSL D2C credit proposals, carry out thorough due diligence within stipulated turnaround times and decision of the cases / recommend the same to respective authorities - Zonal Credit Manager, National Risk Manager, Credit Committee for decision/ approvals on the case
Maintain the quality of portfolio by regularly reviewing the portfolio and suggesting for the policy changes accordingly if any
Regularly Review & Monitor the Portfolio Performance, PDD movement and Compliance related matters
Regularly Review & Monitor Vendor Management and closure of Audit queries
Bringing in the Process Efficiency & Quality Improvement Initiative, Cost Reduction Initiatives and Stakeholder Management

Customer Centricity, Productivity and People Management

2) Dimensions: Mention quantitative or qualitative parameters that are relevant for the job and provide a better understanding of the scope and scale of the job.

Business Workforce Number
 (Max 254 Characters)

Unit Workforce Number
 (Max 254 Characters)

Function Workforce Number
 (Max 254 Characters)

Department Workforce Number
 (Max 254 Characters)

Other Quantitative and Important Parameters for the job: Budgets/ Volumes/No. of Products/Geography/ Markets/ Customers or any other parameter

3) Job Context & Major Challenges: Write the specific aspects of the job that provide a challenge (internal and external) to the jobholder in the context of the Business/Unit/Function/Department/Section ((Max 3975 Characters)

Organizational Context

Key Aspects:

As the lending arm of Aditya Birla Financial Services Group (ABFSG), Aditya Birla Finance Limited (ABFL) offers specialized lending and financing solutions in the areas of Capital Markets, Corporate/ Trade Finance, Commercial Real Estate and Mortgages. Currently ranked within the top 10 NBFCs of India, ABFL has made significant progress and the Company’s balance sheet at INR 45,000 Cr plus exceeds that of several mid-sized Banks and NBFCs
Having focused traditionally on big ticket secured lending verticals and built a strong balance sheet on the same, ABFL has now also ventured into Small Ticket Secured Lending (STSL D2C) Business segment in order to effectively capitalize on its financial base with carefully managed exposures in this higher yield segment
Small Ticket Secured Loan (STSL D2C) segment products line caters to funding medium to long term working capital needs of small businesses and individuals, via a suite of customized medium and long tenured products which are primarily backed by collaterals/security.
Risk function is engaged in evaluating the creditworthiness of business entity/individual applicants by considering quantitative & qualitative factors like the client credibility, size of the client business, earnings of an individual, capital adequacy, liquidity and management quality

Job Context

Key Aspects:

Portfolio Management –
Business & Financial Management -
Customer Focus -
People/Team Management –
Productivity Management & Improvement –
Process & Quality Improvement -

Key Challenges

To ensure availability of data and information for exhaustive credit appraisals as each of the proposals has their respective structuring complexities as per the customer, product & regulatory requirements.
To build strong rapport with sales teams in order to elicit relevant and important information on customer profiles in order to mitigate risks
To ensure faster TATs for approval of credit proposals in a highly competitive & dynamic market.
To keep abreast with market/ regulatory/ product related insights and trends in order to enhance customer interactions and minimize credit or operational risks
To ensure that credit and customer risk are mitigated while pending documentation is monitored and regularized

Enabling Skill Sets & Qualifications

Critical skill required for this role are a strong analytical acumen, evaluation skills, detail orientation & decision making skills.
The education & experience required to meet this profile are a Chartered Accountant or an MBA with minimum 8 – 10 yrs of experience in credit and risk functions of Banks/NBFCs
Significant exposure to mortgage backed products in the self-employed segment with rich experience in underwriting
Exposure to multiple geographies and location specific considerations
Ability to take wholesome view and deduce patterns arising out of various actions
Flair for numbers and an ability to understand processes read balance sheets and understand customer business models
Systematic & Meticulous and Ability to perform under pressure
Good analytical & logical abilities and Good communication
High resilience, energy & initiative
Demonstrate core company values, including high integrity and ethics

Result oriented

4) Key Result Areas: Write the key results expected from the job and the supporting actions for each of these key result areas (For a majority of jobs typically there could be 4- 7 key result areas)- Maximum 10 KRAs can be updated

Key Result Areas (Max 1325 Characters)

Supporting Actions (Max 1325 Characters)

Portfolio Management

Regularly Review & Monitor the Portfolio of the region. Bring in the expertise of identifying the grey areas which need immediate attention of the management. Track the movement of the portfolio is in-line with management mandate.
Quality is measured by delinquency, bounce rates, loss numbers, RCR and File quality scores are key deliverables

Business & Financial Management

Calibrate the capacity plan in line with business needs
 Identify and act upon various risk arising out of credit/process activities
Risk mitigation- bureau/rating agencies/collection reports to be reviewed
Do periodical stress tests to ensure necessary actions are taken in markets having sharp movement in real estate prices
Track and react to external influence on portfolio Bureau/rating agencies

Customer Focus

Take decisions which are aligned to the management directive keeping customer in mind
Bring in the efficiency in the system by enabling decisions being taken within defined timelines
Understand the Salaried / Self Employed market dynamics for STSL business in smaller towns say tier 3 – 4 markets

People/Team Management

Effective training and timely communication of policy & underwriting standard
Manage and supervise direct reports with continuous engagement on portfolio performance, process controls and supervisory review
Interaction with business and allied teams to incorporate changes

Strong interpersonal skills to manage team size of 10+ risk managers

Capable to mentor 3 - 4 middle layer Managers towards progressive career path

Productivity Management & Improvement

Productivity and its management is the key deliverable
Quality is measured by no of files managed on monthly basis
Initiatives for improving the productivity at every level is also one of the key deliverables

5) Job Purpose of Direct Reports: Describe the job purpose of the direct report/s to the job (in 2-3 lines for each report)

Credit Manager/Area Credit Manager: To review STSL credit proposals and carry out all forms of required due diligence within stipulated turnaround times and co-ordinate with business team for resolution of credit risk concerns.

Date of writing/updation of JD

09th Mar 2022


1) Job Purpose: Write the purpose for which the job exists (in 2-3 lines) (Max 1325 Characters)


The purpose of this job is:
  • Review STSL D2C credit proposals, carry out thorough due diligence within stipulated turnaround times and decision of the cases / recommend the same to respective authorities - Zonal Credit Manager, National Risk Manager, Credit Committee for decision/ approvals on the case
  • Maintain the quality of portfolio by regularly reviewing the portfolio and suggesting for the policy changes accordingly if any
  • Regularly Review & Monitor the Portfolio Performance, PDD movement and Compliance related matters
  • Regularly Review & Monitor Vendor Management and closure of Audit queries
  • Bringing in the Process Efficiency & Quality Improvement Initiative, Cost Reduction Initiatives and Stakeholder Management
Customer Centricity, Productivity and People Management

2) Dimensions: Mention quantitative or qualitative parameters that are relevant for the job and provide a better understanding of the scope and scale of the job.


Business Workforce Number
(Max 254 Characters)


Unit Workforce Number
(Max 254 Characters)


Function Workforce Number
(Max 254 Characters)


Department Workforce Number
(Max 254 Characters)


Other Quantitative and Important Parameters for the job: Budgets/ Volumes/No. of Products/Geography/ Markets/ Customers or any other parameter


3) Job Context & Major Challenges: Write the specific aspects of the job that provide a challenge (internal and external) to the jobholder in the context of the Business/Unit/Function/Department/Section ((Max 3975 Characters)


Organizational Context
Key Aspects:
  • As the lending arm of Aditya Birla Financial Services Group (ABFSG), Aditya Birla Finance Limited (ABFL) offers specialized lending and financing solutions in the areas of Capital Markets, Corporate/ Trade Finance, Commercial Real Estate and Mortgages. Currently ranked within the top 10 NBFCs of India, ABFL has made significant progress and the Company’s balance sheet at INR 45,000 Cr plus exceeds that of several mid-sized Banks and NBFCs
  • Having focused traditionally on big ticket secured lending verticals and built a strong balance sheet on the same, ABFL has now also ventured into Small Ticket Secured Lending (STSL D2C) Business segment in order to effectively capitalize on its financial base with carefully managed exposures in this higher yield segment
  • Small Ticket Secured Loan (STSL D2C) segment products line caters to funding medium to long term working capital needs of small businesses and individuals, via a suite of customized medium and long tenured products which are primarily backed by collaterals/security.
  • Risk function is engaged in evaluating the creditworthiness of business entity/individual applicants by considering quantitative & qualitative factors like the client credibility, size of the client business, earnings of an individual, capital adequacy, liquidity and management quality

Job Context
Key Aspects:
  • Portfolio Management –
  • Business & Financial Management -
  • Customer Focus -
  • People/Team Management –
  • Productivity Management & Improvement –
  • Process & Quality Improvement -

Key Challenges
  • To ensure availability of data and information for exhaustive credit appraisals as each of the proposals has their respective structuring complexities as per the customer, product & regulatory requirements.
  • To build strong rapport with sales teams in order to elicit relevant and important information on customer profiles in order to mitigate risks
  • To ensure faster TATs for approval of credit proposals in a highly competitive & dynamic market.
  • To keep abreast with market/ regulatory/ product related insights and trends in order to enhance customer interactions and minimize credit or operational risks
  • To ensure that credit and customer risk are mitigated while pending documentation is monitored and regularized

Enabling Skill Sets & Qualifications
  • Critical skill required for this role are a strong analytical acumen, evaluation skills, detail orientation & decision making skills.
  • The education & experience required to meet this profile are a Chartered Accountant or an MBA with minimum 8 – 10 yrs of experience in credit and risk functions of Banks/NBFCs
  • Significant exposure to mortgage backed products in the self-employed segment with rich experience in underwriting
  • Exposure to multiple geographies and location specific considerations
  • Ability to take wholesome view and deduce patterns arising out of various actions
  • Flair for numbers and an ability to understand processes read balance sheets and understand customer business models
  • Systematic & Meticulous and Ability to perform under pressure
  • Good analytical & logical abilities and Good communication
  • High resilience, energy & initiative
  • Demonstrate core company values, including high integrity and ethics
Result oriented


4) Key Result Areas: Write the key results expected from the job and the supporting actions for each of these key result areas (For a majority of jobs typically there could be 4- 7 key result areas)- Maximum 10 KRAs can be updated


Key Result Areas (Max 1325 Characters)

Supporting Actions (Max 1325 Characters)

Portfolio Management

  • Regularly Review & Monitor the Portfolio of the region. Bring in the expertise of identifying the grey areas which need immediate attention of the management. Track the movement of the portfolio is in-line with management mandate.
  • Quality is measured by delinquency, bounce rates, loss numbers, RCR and File quality scores are key deliverables

Business & Financial Management

  • Calibrate the capacity plan in line with business needs
  • Identify and act upon various risk arising out of credit/process activities
  • Risk mitigation- bureau/rating agencies/collection reports to be reviewed
  • Do periodical stress tests to ensure necessary actions are taken in markets having sharp movement in real estate prices
  • Track and react to external influence on portfolio Bureau/rating agencies

Customer Focus

  • Take decisions which are aligned to the management directive keeping customer in mind
  • Bring in the efficiency in the system by enabling decisions being taken within defined timelines
  • Understand the Salaried / Self Employed market dynamics for STSL business in smaller towns say tier 3 – 4 markets

People/Team Management

  • Effective training and timely communication of policy & underwriting standard
  • Manage and supervise direct reports with continuous engagement on portfolio performance, process controls and supervisory review
  • Interaction with business and allied teams to incorporate changes
Strong interpersonal skills to manage team size of 10+ risk managers
Capable to mentor 3 - 4 middle layer Managers towards progressive career path

Productivity Management & Improvement

  • Productivity and its management is the key deliverable
  • Quality is measured by no of files managed on monthly basis
  • Initiatives for improving the productivity at every level is also one of the key deliverables


5) Job Purpose of Direct Reports: Describe the job purpose of the direct report/s to the job (in 2-3 lines for each report)


Credit Manager/Area Credit Manager: To review STSL credit proposals and carry out all forms of required due diligence within stipulated turnaround times and co-ordinate with business team for resolution of credit risk concerns.

employer.name: Everise
employer.briefDescription: Everise is a global leader transforming customer service for the world's leading brands, by combining the best technology with great service.

description.text:
Company Overview

Join us on our mission to elevate customer experiences for people around the world. As a member of the Everise family, you will be part of a global experience company that believes in being people-first, celebrating diversity and incubating innovation. Our dedication to our purpose and people is being recognized by our employees and the industry. Our 4.6/5 rating on Glassdoor and our shiny, growing wall of Best Place to Work awards is a testament to our investment in our culture. Through the power of diversity, we celebrate all cultures for their uniqueness and strengths. With 13 centers around the world and a robust work at home program, we believe great things happen when we work with people who think differently from us. Find a job you’ll love today!

Key Responsibilities:
• Outsourced development / Working with outside teams
• Reviewing outsourced work and stack
• Team management of ~12-15 size
• Comfortable with having direct discussions with the infra/tech team of
customers
• Time split – 80% engaging with internal stakeholders, 20% customer
engagements
Engineering Leadership: Lead and manage a multidisciplinary engineering team,
including full-stack developers, UI/UX developers, backend developers, database
administrators, QA teams, and team leads.
Technical Strategy: Define and execute the technical strategy to support the
development and delivery of high-quality products that are scalable, secure, and have
a bar for high performance.
Team Building: Recruit, hire, and retain top engineering talent, fostering a culture of
innovation, continuous learning, and excellence.

Collaboration: Work closely with the Head of Product Management to align
engineering efforts with product goals, with timely delivery of features and
enhancements.
Process Improvement: Implement and optimize engineering processes, tools, and
methodologies to increase efficiency and quality across the development lifecycle.
Technical Oversight: Provide hands-on technical guidance and mentorship to
engineering teams, implementing best practices in software development,
architecture, and quality assurance.
Budget Management: Manage the engineering budget, with cost-effective use of
resources while delivering on technical objectives.
Risk Management: Identify and mitigate technical risks, resulting in robust architecture
and systems that support the division’s long-term goals.
Innovation: Stay abreast of industry trends, emerging technologies, and best practices,
driving continuous improvement and innovation within the engineering team.
Stakeholder Communication: Collaborate with senior leadership, providing regular
updates on engineering progress, challenges, and opportunities. Occasional
Collaboration with external stakeholders
Qualifications:
Experience: 12+ years of experience in software engineering, with at least 5 years in
a leadership role overseeing engineering teams.
Technical Expertise: Deep expertise in full-stack development, infrastructure,
database designs and management, and QA methodologies, with a strong
understanding of modern technology stacks and frameworks.
Leadership Skills: Proven track record of leading and scaling engineering teams, with
a focus on delivering high-quality products in a fast-paced, agile environment.

Problem-Solving: Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with the ability to
navigate complex technical challenges and make sound decisions under pressure.
Collaboration: Excellent collaboration skills, with the ability to work effectively with
product management, design, and other cross-functional teams.
Communication Skills: Strong communication skills, with the ability to convey technical
concepts to non-technical stakeholders and present complex information clearly.
Education: Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Engineering, or a related field;
advanced degree preferred.

If you’ve got the skills to succeed and the motivation to make it happen, we look forward to hearing from you.

description.text:
*Job Title:* Quality Control (QC) Supervisor

*Department:* Quality Assurance / Quality Control

*Industry:* Packaging Manufacturing (Plastic / Flexible / Rigid / Corrugated)

*Reports To:* QA/QC Manager / Plant Head

*Job Purpose:*

To ensure consistent product quality by supervising quality control processes, monitoring production activities, and implementing quality standards in packaging manufacturing.

*Key Responsibilities:*

*1. Quality Monitoring & Inspection*

* Supervise in-process and final inspection of packaging products.
* Ensure adherence to quality standards, specifications, and customer requirements.
* Approve or reject raw materials, in-process materials, and finished goods.

*2. Process Control*

* Monitor production processes to ensure compliance with quality parameters.
* Identify deviations and implement corrective and preventive actions (CAPA).
* Conduct root cause analysis for defects and quality issues.

*3. Documentation & Reporting*

* Maintain quality records, inspection reports, and test results.
* Prepare daily/weekly quality reports and share with management.
* Ensure compliance with ISO / GMP / other regulatory documentation.

*4. Team Supervision*

* Lead and guide QC inspectors and lab technicians.
* Allocate work, monitor performance, and provide training.
* Ensure discipline and adherence to safety and quality protocols.

*5. Testing & Calibration*

* Oversee testing of materials (GSM, thickness, bursting strength, etc.).
* Ensure calibration and maintenance of testing instruments.
* Validate test methods and results.

*6. Customer & Audit Handling*

* Address customer complaints and ensure timely resolution.
* Participate in internal and external audits.
* Ensure audit readiness and compliance with standards.

*7. Continuous Improvement*

* Implement quality improvement initiatives like Kaizen, 5S, Lean practices.
* Reduce rejection, rework, and wastage.
* Suggest process improvements for better quality output.

*Key Skills & Competencies:*

* Strong knowledge of packaging quality standards and testing methods

Job Types: Full-time, Permanent

Pay: ₹200,000.00 - ₹350,000.00 per year

Work Location: In person

description.text:
*Job Title: Head – Research & Development (Dermaceuticals / Cosmetic Division)*

*Industry: Dermaceuticals / Cosmetics / Personal Care*

*Experience Required: Minimum 12–20 Years*

*Position Overview*

Company is seeking a highly experienced R&D Head with strong expertise in

dermatology-driven cosmetic and dermaceutical product development. The role will lead

innovation, formulation strategy, regulatory alignment, and commercialization of scientifically backed skincare and therapeutic cosmetic products.

The ideal candidate should have deep technical knowledge of active ingredients, clinical-backed formulations, skin biology, and dermatology-focused product pipelines.

*Key Responsibilities :*

1. Strategic & Innovation Leadership

 Define and execute the R&D strategy for dermaceutical and advanced skincare portfolios.

 Drive innovation in treatment-based skincare categories (acne, pigmentation, anti-aging,

sensitive skin, hair/scalp disorders, etc.).

 Identify emerging dermatological trends, actives, delivery systems, and global

innovations.

 Build long-term product pipelines aligned with business and brand strategy.

2. Dermaceutical Product Development

 Lead formulation development of dermatology-oriented products including creams, gels,

serums, lotions, cleansers, sunscreens, and prescription-support cosmetics.

 Work with high-performance active ingredients such as peptides, retinoids, AHAs/BHAs,

ceramides, niacinamide, hyaluronic acid, and other clinically validated compounds.

 Ensure stability, compatibility, safety, and efficacy validation through lab and clinical

testing.

 Oversee pilot trials, scale-up, and technology transfer to manufacturing.

3. Clinical & Regulatory Expertise

 Ensure compliance with cosmetic and dermaceutical regulatory frameworks.

 Coordinate dermatological testing, safety assessments, and clinical substantiation studies.

 Prepare and review technical dossiers, claims substantiation, and product documentation.

 Work closely with regulatory and quality teams to ensure GMP adherence.

4. Cross-Functional Collaboration

 Partner with Marketing for product positioning based on scientific claims.

 Support Sales teams with technical training and product knowledge.

 Collaborate with Procurement for sourcing advanced raw materials and evaluating

suppliers.

5. Lab & Team Leadership

 Lead, mentor, and expand the R&D team including formulators and analysts.

 Establish SOPs, validation protocols, and testing standards.

 Manage R&D budgets, lab infrastructure, and innovation investments.

*Key Competencies*

 Strong understanding of skin physiology and dermatological conditions

 Expertise in advanced actives and delivery systems

 Strategic innovation and pipeline management

 Regulatory and compliance knowledge

 Leadership and stakeholder management

 Analytical and problem-solving capability

Job Type: Full-time

Pay: ₹1,600,000.00 - ₹1,900,000.00 per year

Work Location: In person

employer.name: Bosch
employer.briefDescription: Bosch is a leading IoT company and global supplier of technology and services in the Mobility Solutions, Industrial Technology, Consumer Goods, and Energy and Building Technology sectors.

description.text:
Company Description

Company Description

The Bosch Group is a leading global supplier of technology and services, in the areas of Automotive Technology, Industrial Technology, Consumer Goods, Energy and Building Technology.
In India, the Group operates through nine companies with a combined strength of over 30,000 associates which includes around 14,000 research and development associates.
Bosch Rexroth AG is one of the world's leading specialists in the field of drive and control technologies. Under the brand name of Rexroth the company supplies customers with tailored solutions for driving, controlling and moving - for industrial applications and factory automation, mobile applications and using renewable energies.
Bosch Rexroth India Pvt. Ltd. is 100% subsidiary of Bosch Rexroth AG, having Sales Turnover of around INR 2000 Crores in 2024 & Head office & Plant at Sanand, Ahmedabad.
We invite promising and dynamic professionals for a long-term and rewarding career with Bosch.

“The Bosch Group is a globally recognized provider of technology and services, excelling in Automotive Technology, Industrial Technology, Consumer Goods, Energy, and Building Technology. With a strong presence in India, the Group operates through nine companies and boasts an impressive workforce of over 400,000 associates, including approximately 20,000 dedicated to research and development. Among its subsidiaries, Bosch Rexroth AG stands out as a leading expert in drive and control technologies. Changing scenes on the theatre, production lines that automatically adapt to new products in the factory of the future, always sufficient power for moving slice gates that weigh several metric tons, and mobile machines conquering narrow forest trails or the largest construction sites in the world: Creating movement is our driving force.

As a global partner, Bosch Rexroth stands by mechanical and plant engineering challenges worldwide, armed with cutting-edge technology and unparalleled industry expertise. With a dedicated workforce of over 32,300 employees, we strive to deliver safe, efficient, intelligent, and powerful solutions. Our team excels in enabling cost-effective production of small batch sizes and optimizing energy consumption while boosting productivity. Equipped with a diverse cross-technology portfolio, digital services, and comprehensive support, we are committed to being your ultimate partner for machines and plants. With us, movement is synonymous with success. WE MOVE. YOU WIN.

As a subsidiary of Bosch Rexroth AG, Bosch Rexroth India is not just a leading provider of drive and control technologies; it is also a fantastic place to build a rewarding career. With its strong commitment to employee development and well-being, Bosch Rexroth India creates an environment that fosters growth, innovation, and collaboration with proven track record of turnover of 1300cr+. The company values its talented workforce and provides ample opportunities for learning and advancement, with a focus on promoting a healthy work-life balance. As part of the Bosch Group, Bosch Rexroth India benefits from the global organization's resources and expertise, allowing employees to be a part of groundbreaking projects and cutting-edge technologies. Furthermore, the company's inclusive and diverse culture encourages creativity and teamwork, making it a great place for professionals seeking a dynamic and fulfilling work experience. At Bosch Rexroth India, employees are not only part of a renowned organization but also empowered to make a real impact in driving the future of technology and engineering. WE MOVE. YOU WIN.”

Job Description

Major Job Responsibilities:
Customer Order Processing, Price Management,
Monthly weekly schedule preparation, Coordination with Front sales and cross functional team for end to end
Order execution
Inventory management

Qualifications

Job Title / Designation: Executive / Officer Customer Order management
Location: Bangalore
Essential Educational Qualification: Graduate in Commerce, Science
Preferred Educational Qualification: Graduate in Commerce, Science
No. of years of Experience required: 0-4 years

Additional Information

Knowledge / Specialization / Experience / Expertise required in the areas like:

Inside Sales, Customer communication, techno commercial skills related to OEM sales
Supply chain management

Type of Industry Preferred: Hydraulic products manufacturing / service / development

Auto ancillary, Automobile OEM/ tier1 supplier any Industries

employer.name: Colgate-Palmolive
employer.briefDescription: We are Colgate, a caring, innovative growth company that is reimagining a healthier future for all people, their pets and our planet.

description.text:
Relocation Assistance Offered Within Country
Job Number #172992 - Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

Who We Are

Colgate-Palmolive Company is a global consumer products company operating in over 200 countries specialising in Oral Care, Personal Care, Home Care, Skin Care, and Pet Nutrition. Our products are trusted in more households than any other brand in the world, making us a household name!

Join Colgate-Palmolive, a caring, innovative growth company reimagining a healthier future for people, their pets, and our planet. Guided by our core values—Caring, Inclusive, and Courageous—we foster a culture that inspires our people to achieve common goals. Together, let's build a brighter, healthier future for all.

Brief introduction:

This position is part of Colgate’s Global Packaging organization, and will be responsible for leading India packaging.

This position provides stewardship to India Packaging strategies of Driving Growth, by developing and implementing innovative consumer preferred packaging.

This position delivers Funding the Growth, by driving savings and standardization efforts in the region.

This position leads and drives Packaging Sustainability agenda for India, by identifying initiatives and developing implementation plans to support company mandates and local regulatory-driven programs.

The role is cross-functional in nature, working closely with Marketing, CIC (Innovation), Supply Chain (Procurement, Operations, Logistics), Quality and GTC (R&D) teams. Partnerships with outside packaging vendors and industry are a critical element of job responsibilities.

This position is part of the APAC Packaging organization, it collaborates with talented engineers in each of the Colgate subsidiaries, Global Packaging Innovation, Global Category Packaging team.

Responsibilities:

Lead India Packaging organization for all the categories in CP India, including toothpaste, toothbrush and personal care;

Lead Packaging Innovation: Drive the development of new packaging solutions to elevate superior consumer experience, including formats and materials, focusing on sustainability, functionality, and shelf-appeal to create a competitive advantage in the Indian market. Stay aware of supplier and competitor new developments. Monitor and evaluate best practices in the local and global market on packaging;

Drive Commercialization Excellence: Oversee the entire commercialization lifecycle, ensuring scale-up of packaging solutions from pilot phase to mass manufacturing, mitigating risks and ensuring speed-to-market.

Provide training and guidance of Packaging protocols (MTP, KRS) and procedures to the Packaging Organization in India, and constantly monitor to ensure they are followed properly.

Work with Quality and cross-functions to deliver measurable Quality KPIs. Develop packaging roadmaps to strengthen packaging validation and right first time. Support local teams with cross-functional analysis of quality packaging situations to identify root causes and drive resolution;

Fund the Growth through Value Engineering & Cost Optimization: Strategically manage packaging costs by identifying value engineering opportunities and optimizing material specifications without compromising on quality or brand integrity.

Sustainability & Compliance: Champion the organization’s sustainability agenda by implementing eco-friendly solutions (e.g., reduce, reuse, recycle) and ensuring full compliance with India’s Plastic Waste Management (PWM) rules and regulatory standards.

Cross-Functional Collaboration: Partner closely with Marketing, Manufacturing/ Supply Chain, Procurement, and IGTC (R&D) teams to present, align packaging strategies with broader business goals and operational capabilities.

Prepare and present status of priorities and objectives to Global and regional stakeholders;

Coordinate Packaging & GTC meetings to ensure project alignment and monitor project progress. Identify and elevate risks and roadblocks.

Define and provide stewardship in collaboration with procurement to the packaging materials strategy

Drive project management , governance and review of all key packaging innovation and commercialization projects to ensure delivery within agreed timelines, on time and in full.

Develop, coach and grow the Packaging team to max out their full potential and to support business growth agenda.

Required Qualifications:

Bachelor’s/ Master’s in Packaging, Engineering or Material Science

Minimum 10 years of experience in Packaging in Consumer Products or Pharma industries

Team Leadership experience

Ability to travel 5-20% (domestic and Global) based on project needs

Preferred Skills & Qualifications:

Strong project management skills; .Experience coordinating packaging development projects with Formula Development, Marketing and the Supply Chain.

Technical depth on packaging innovation, development, validation and problem solving.

Developing and Coaching people

Teamwork and collaboration

Driving Innovation

Business/Global Perspective

Strategy/Vision

Consumer/ Customer Focused

Influence /Negotiation

#LI-HR1

#colgateemployee, #teamcolgate, #wearecolgate, #buildafuture, #CPValues

Our Commitment to Inclusion
Our journey begins with our people—developing strong talent with diverse backgrounds and perspectives to best serve our consumers around the world and fostering an inclusive environment where everyone feels a true sense of belonging. We are dedicated to ensuring that each individual can be their authentic self, is treated with respect, and is empowered by leadership to contribute meaningfully to our business.

Equal Opportunity Employer
Colgate is an equal opportunity employer and all qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, colour, religion, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, national origin, ethnicity, age, disability, marital status, veteran status (United States positions), or any other characteristic protected by law.

Reasonable accommodation during the application process is available for persons with disabilities. Please complete this request form should you require accommodation.
