employer.name: Wabtec
employer.briefDescription: Wabtec is a global supplier of value-added, technology-based products and services for freight rail, passenger transit and related markets.

description.text:
Company Description

Wabtec Corporation https://www.wabteccorp.com is a leading global provider of equipment, systems, digital solutions, and value-added services for freight and transit rail as well as the mining, marine, and industrial markets. Drawing on nearly four centuries of collective experience across Wabtec, GE Transportation, and Faiveley Transport, the company has grown to become One Wabtec, with unmatched digital expertise, technological innovation, and world-class manufacturing and services, enabling the digital-rail-and-transit ecosystems.

Wabtec is focused on performance that drives progress and unlocks our customers’ potential by delivering innovative and lasting transportation solutions that move and improve the world. We are lifelong learners obsessed with making things better to drive exceptional results. Wabtec has approximately 30K employees in facilities throughout the world.

This role is in one of our recently acquired company - Frauscher Sensor Technology India Private Limited, A Wabtec company) www.frauscher.in .

Job Description

Position Title - Head of Operations / Plant Manager

Location - Mysore, Karnataka.

Role Summary – As the Plant Manager for our upcoming plant in Mysore, you will work closely with a cross-functional manufacturing leadership team including Supply Chain, Quality, Engineering, Finance, HR, and Project teams. The role involves strong collaboration with local and global sites to align production, supply chain, and quality objectives with overall business strategy. You will be responsible for leading end-to-end production operations at the Mysore site, including production planning, quality, logistics, procurement, and supply chain. You will support business objectives by ensuring safe, compliant, cost-effective, and high-quality manufacturing operations while driving continuous improvement initiatives. This role leads process optimization, capital investment planning, and people development.

The role reports to Global Operations Leader and works closely with the Managing Director.

Key Job Responsibilities

Lead and manage production, planning, quality, logistics, and procurement activities at the Mysore facility in close collaboration and co-ordination with our global site/s
Ensure highest level of EHS Standards at the pant
Design/implement processes/procedures that effectively support the business.
Generate, cultivate and communicate ideas for continual improvement of processes and activities across all areas of the operation.
Drive achievement of production targets related to cost, quality, delivery, and safety
Monitor and continuously improve production processes using Lean and continuous improvement tools
Manage departmental budgeting, forecasting, and capital investment planning
Coach, mentor, and develop direct and indirect team members; identify skill gaps and training needs
All Financial, Commercial & Administrative Approvals
Ensure all Process, System & Access Governance at met

Ensure every Quality, Safety & Compliance standards are met at the plant

Qualifications

Required Experience & Qualifications

Bachelor’s/Master’s degree in production engineering, Operations, Business Management, or a comparable discipline
Minimum 15+ years of experience in production or manufacturing operations with proven leadership, strong technical knowledge of electronics assembly or electronic manufacturing services (EMS).
Experience with high-level strategic planning and daily tactical management of production lines, primarily focusing on high-precision electronics like Printed Circuit Board Assemblies (PCBAs).
Proven leadership experience managing medium-sized manufacturing operations with serial production with a global footprint.
Strong understanding of manufacturing processes, supply chain management, and production planning & control
Experience with Lean Manufacturing, 5S, Kaizen, and process optimization methodologies
High level of quality awareness and operational excellence mindset
Experience working in an MNC; international exposure preferred

Additional Information

Our Commitment to Embrace Diversity - Wabtec is a global company that invests not just in our products, but also our people by embracing diversity and inclusion. We care about our relationships with our employees and take pride in celebrating the variety of experiences, expertise, and backgrounds that bring us together. At Wabtec, we aspire to create a place where we all belong and where diversity is welcomed and appreciated. To fulfill that commitment, we rely on a culture of leadership, diversity, and inclusion. We aim to employ the world’s brightest minds to help us create a limitless source of ideas and opportunities. We have created a space where everyone is given the opportunity to contribute based on their individual experiences and perspectives and recognize that these differences and diverse perspectives make us better.We believe in hiring talented people of varied backgrounds, experiences, and styles… People like you!
Wabtec Corporation is committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or expression, or protected Veteran status. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know.

What could you accomplish in a place that puts People First?

At Wabtec, it’s not just about a job - it’s about the impact you make. When our people come together, we’re Expanding the Possible by continuously improving what we do and how we do it - for our clients and each other.

If you’re ready to revolutionize how the world moves for future generations, Wabtec is the place for you.

Who are we?

Wabtec is a leading global provider of equipment, systems, digital solutions, and value-added services for the freight and transit rail sectors. Drawing on more than 150 years of experience, we are leading the way in safety, efficiency, reliability, innovation, and productivity. Whether it’s freight, transit, ports, logistics, mining, industrial, or marine, our expertise, technologies, and people together – are accelerating the future of transportation. With roots that date back to George Westinghouse, Thomas Edison, and Louis Faiveley, Wabtec has always built technologies and implemented solutions for a variety of sectors that are critical to meeting the needs of customers and governments alike.

Our global team of about 30,000 employees worldwide delivers performance that moves the world forward. We’re lifelong learners, obsessed with better. Learn more at www.WabtecCorp.com.

Culture powers us and the possibilities.

We believe the best ideas come from a mix of experiences and backgrounds. At Wabtec, we strive every day to create a place where everyone belongs. We’re building a culture where leadership, inclusion and your unique perspective fuel progress.

We’re proud to be an Equal Opportunity Employer. We welcome talent of all backgrounds, experiences, and identities, including race, gender, age, disability, veteran status and more.

Need accommodation? Just let us know - we’ve got you.
description.html:
Company Description


Wabtec Corporation https://www.wabteccorp.com is a leading global provider of equipment, systems, digital solutions, and value-added services for freight and transit rail as well as the mining, marine, and industrial markets. Drawing on nearly four centuries of collective experience across Wabtec, GE Transportation, and Faiveley Transport, the company has grown to become One Wabtec, with unmatched digital expertise, technological innovation, and world-class manufacturing and services, enabling the digital-rail-and-transit ecosystems.

Wabtec is focused on performance that drives progress and unlocks our customers’ potential by delivering innovative and lasting transportation solutions that move and improve the world. We are lifelong learners obsessed with making things better to drive exceptional results. Wabtec has approximately 30K employees in facilities throughout the world.

This role is in one of our recently acquired company - Frauscher Sensor Technology India Private Limited, A Wabtec company) www.frauscher.in .


Job Description


Position Title - Head of Operations / Plant Manager

Location - Mysore, Karnataka.

Role Summary – As the Plant Manager for our upcoming plant in Mysore, you will work closely with a cross-functional manufacturing leadership team including Supply Chain, Quality, Engineering, Finance, HR, and Project teams. The role involves strong collaboration with local and global sites to align production, supply chain, and quality objectives with overall business strategy. You will be responsible for leading end-to-end production operations at the Mysore site, including production planning, quality, logistics, procurement, and supply chain. You will support business objectives by ensuring safe, compliant, cost-effective, and high-quality manufacturing operations while driving continuous improvement initiatives. This role leads process optimization, capital investment planning, and people development.

The role reports to Global Operations Leader and works closely with the Managing Director.

Key Job Responsibilities

  • Lead and manage production, planning, quality, logistics, and procurement activities at the Mysore facility in close collaboration and co-ordination with our global site/s
  • Ensure highest level of EHS Standards at the pant
  • Design/implement processes/procedures that effectively support the business.
  • Generate, cultivate and communicate ideas for continual improvement of processes and activities across all areas of the operation.
  • Drive achievement of production targets related to cost, quality, delivery, and safety
  • Monitor and continuously improve production processes using Lean and continuous improvement tools
  • Manage departmental budgeting, forecasting, and capital investment planning
  • Coach, mentor, and develop direct and indirect team members; identify skill gaps and training needs
  • All Financial, Commercial & Administrative Approvals
  • Ensure all Process, System & Access Governance at met

Ensure every Quality, Safety & Compliance standards are met at the plant


Qualifications


Required Experience & Qualifications

  • Bachelor’s/Master’s degree in production engineering, Operations, Business Management, or a comparable discipline
  • Minimum 15+ years of experience in production or manufacturing operations with proven leadership, strong technical knowledge of electronics assembly or electronic manufacturing services (EMS).
  • Experience with high-level strategic planning and daily tactical management of production lines, primarily focusing on high-precision electronics like Printed Circuit Board Assemblies (PCBAs).
  • Proven leadership experience managing medium-sized manufacturing operations with serial production with a global footprint.
  • Strong understanding of manufacturing processes, supply chain management, and production planning & control
  • Experience with Lean Manufacturing, 5S, Kaizen, and process optimization methodologies
  • High level of quality awareness and operational excellence mindset
  • Experience working in an MNC; international exposure preferred

Additional Information


Our Commitment to Embrace Diversity - Wabtec is a global company that invests not just in our products, but also our people by embracing diversity and inclusion. We care about our relationships with our employees and take pride in celebrating the variety of experiences, expertise, and backgrounds that bring us together. At Wabtec, we aspire to create a place where we all belong and where diversity is welcomed and appreciated. To fulfill that commitment, we rely on a culture of leadership, diversity, and inclusion. We aim to employ the world’s brightest minds to help us create a limitless source of ideas and opportunities. We have created a space where everyone is given the opportunity to contribute based on their individual experiences and perspectives and recognize that these differences and diverse perspectives make us better.We believe in hiring talented people of varied backgrounds, experiences, and styles… People like you!
Wabtec Corporation is committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or expression, or protected Veteran status. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know.

What could you accomplish in a place that puts People First?

At Wabtec, it’s not just about a job - it’s about the impact you make. When our people come together, we’re Expanding the Possible by continuously improving what we do and how we do it - for our clients and each other.

If you’re ready to revolutionize how the world moves for future generations, Wabtec is the place for you.

Who are we?

Wabtec is a leading global provider of equipment, systems, digital solutions, and value-added services for the freight and transit rail sectors. Drawing on more than 150 years of experience, we are leading the way in safety, efficiency, reliability, innovation, and productivity. Whether it’s freight, transit, ports, logistics, mining, industrial, or marine, our expertise, technologies, and people together – are accelerating the future of transportation. With roots that date back to George Westinghouse, Thomas Edison, and Louis Faiveley, Wabtec has always built technologies and implemented solutions for a variety of sectors that are critical to meeting the needs of customers and governments alike.

Our global team of about 30,000 employees worldwide delivers performance that moves the world forward. We’re lifelong learners, obsessed with better. Learn more at www.WabtecCorp.com.

Culture powers us and the possibilities.

We believe the best ideas come from a mix of experiences and backgrounds. At Wabtec, we strive every day to create a place where everyone belongs. We’re building a culture where leadership, inclusion and your unique perspective fuel progress.

employer.name: Galderma
employer.briefDescription: Advancing dermatology for every skin story.

description.text:
Galderma is the emerging pure-play dermatology category leader, present in approximately 90 countries. We deliver an innovative, science-based portfolio of premium flagship brands and services that span the full spectrum of the fast-growing dermatology market through Injectable Aesthetics, Dermatological Skincare and Therapeutic Dermatology. Since our foundation in 1981, we have dedicated our focus and passion to the human body's largest organ - the skin - meeting individual consumer and patient needs with superior outcomes in partnership with healthcare professionals. Because we understand that the skin, we are in shapes our lives, we are advancing dermatology for every skin story.

We look for people who focus on getting results, embrace learning and bring a positive energy. They must combine initiative with a sense of teamwork and collaboration. Above all, they must be passionate about doing something meaningful for consumers, patients, and the healthcare professionals we serve every day. We aim to empower each employee and promote their personal growth while ensuring business needs are met now and into the future. Across our company, we embrace diversity and respect the dignity, privacy, and personal rights of every employee.

At Galderma, we actively give our teams reasons to believe in our bold ambition to become the leading dermatology company in the world. With us, you have the ultimate opportunity to gain new and challenging work experiences and create an unparalleled, direct impact.

At Galderma we’re unique and we embrace difference.

Whether it’s the unique breadth of our integrated offering that covers Aesthetics, Consumer, and Prescription products; or our commitment to recognising and rewarding people for the contribution they make – working here isn’t like anywhere else.

Job Title: Medical Advisor

Location: Mumbai

Job Description: This role will ensure effective and up-to-date communication of scientific data through external engagements enabling healthcare professionals and health decision makers to bring relevant healthcare solutions to their patients, Bring medical and technical expertise to the relevant brand teams, with specific focus on Prescription and Consumer business. Under the overall guidance and supervision of Medical Affairs Head & Medical Affairs Manager

Key Responsibilities:

1. Management of medical plans

Partner with country commercial team to develop and implement medico-marketing plans to ensure continued success and competitive leadership of Galderma products.

Provide proactive input and reactive support to the R&D development strategy and projects according to country needs for success of new product launches.

2. Medical Training

Develop training materials and deliver disease and product training to commercial and sales partners

Act as speaker for the disease area and scientific knowledge of Galderma portfolio

3. Review & approval of Promotional and non-promotional materials

Manage the integrity and accuracy of scientific and medical data communication both internally and externally for promotional and non-promotional purposes

Review and approval of medical, promotional, market access and other information materials for country consumption

Contribute to claims’ development strategies and implementations for new and marketed products

4. Management of Medical Information and Inquiries

Manage and response to HCPs and customer medical inquiries and information activities related to Galderma’s products in accordance with regional /local model, referencing global standard responses

5. Evidence Generation and Data dissemination

Responsible for the local clinical evidence generation strategy and communication plans

Manage investigator- initiated studies (IIT) and support facilitation of IIT and other local clinical trials (e.g. Phase III & Phase IV), including oversight and management of CRO

Communicate actively with internal and external stakeholders on current and new medical scientific data

6. Medical education and scientific engagements

Organize scientific engagements and medical education and professional development of experts (e.g. advisory boards, medical symposiums)

Provide medical and scientific expertise to support product launches, key scientific meetings, relationship management with leading research physicians and critical evaluation of current literature

7. KOL and Medical Society Engagement and Development plans

Interact with KOLs and healthcare decision makers at scientific meetings and other medical forums

Engage in scientific exchange with KOLs to obtain input on disease landscape, current data, and evidence gaps for Galderma marketed and development stage products.

Track treatment guidelines and conduct peer to peer scientific discussions to maintain a reliable presence with KOLs and develop professional relationships.

Serve as a resource for scientific expert to provide inputs on external medical society collaboration and partnerships.

Establish and maintain professional and credible relationships with KOL key and academic centers/centers of excellence

Partner with academic centers, teaching institutions/universities to develop education programs, trainings and professional development of experts

8. Risk Management and Compliance

Lead on continual critical evaluation of engagements in relations to HCPs and Healthcare organizations (e.g. grants, sponsorships) in India to ensure that it is consistent with both, the internal policies & local regulations, proactively identify challenges, and develop contingency plans to meet them.

Skills & Qualifications :

Medical Degree with minimum 2 years of Medical Affairs experience within pharmaceutical industry

Basic knowledge of pharmaceutical industry, drug discovery, research & development, commercialization, promotion, and applicable policies, procedures, regulations, and guidelines

Knowledge of Dermatology therapy area and local regulations preferred

Knowledge of the overall drug, device and cosmetic discovery, development and commercialization process

Experience with risk management and HCP compliance preferred

Experience and demonstrated ability to manage highly trained medical, scientific and technical professionals preferred

Experience in development and implementation of clinical trials

Experience in the principles and techniques of data analysis, interpretation and clinical relevance

Experience in writing clinical publication and delivery of scientific presentations

Relationships with external KOLs and thought leaders

Skills: Superior communication (both verbal and written) and presentation skills. Strong analytical and strategic thinking skills, with sound medical judgment and decision-making ability. Ability to proactively predict issues, problem-solving skills, with result orientation. Strong Interpersonal skills, with ability to work within immediate and extended teams

Ability to proactively predict issues, problem-solving skills, with result orientation. Strong Interpersonal skills, with ability to work within immediate and extended teams

title: Analyst, Divisional M&A and Portfolio Optimization

employer.name: S&P Global
employer.briefDescription: We deliver Essential Intelligence that powers decision making. S&P Global provides the world’s leading organizations with the right data, connected technologies and expertise they need to move ahead.

description.text:
Analyst, Divisional M&A and Portfolio Optimization
Gurgaon, India
Business Management
327886
Job Description

About the Role:

Grade Level (for internal use):

10

The Team:

The MI Business Transformation, Strategy & Special Projects team is responsible for guiding the overall strategy of the Market Intelligence division of S&P Global. In addition to setting long-term strategic ambitions for the division, the team leads acquisitions and divestitures, strategic partnerships, portfolio management, growth initiatives and competitive intelligence. The team also partners closely with Finance and business stakeholders on long-term financial planning. This small, nimble team is responsible for evaluating all significant new investments for Market Intelligence and defining the requirements for delivering future growth coupled with large-scale business transformation initiatives aimed at optimizing portfolio strategy and improving business profitability and productivity.

Responsibilities and Impact:

Partner with business leaders across the division to shape and execute MI’s strategy. Report to the Head of Business Development & Portfolio Optimization, while supporting a diverse set of transactional (i.e. M&A, divestiture), portfolio (i.e. turnaround, optimization), and special projects in accordance with the division’s top priorities across our products. Inform and influence high impact decisions by the division’s top leadership, including the President, CFO, and Head of Strategy.

Oversee M&A operational activities, including managing transaction pipelines and trackers, developing company teasers and internal deal materials, researching and screening potential acquisition targets, tracking post‑close items such as earn‑outs, and handling other M&A‑related coordination and administrative support as needed.
Support a diverse set of business and corporate development-related activities ranging from acquisitions (M&A), venture investing, and partnerships in support of divisional growth priorities
Collaborate with cross-functional teams (Enterprise Corp Dev, Finance, Legal, Technology) to support the end-to-end transaction process (i.e. initial assessments, due diligence, valuation, and synergy case creation)
Contribute to divisional portfolio strategy by evaluating our products across a range of financial and strategic metrics, market fit and industry outlook; and support with various divestiture, turnaround, and sunset projects
Champion a data-driven, hypothesis-led approach to strategic decision-making across the enterprise.
Support the creation of materials for strategic meetings, including Board meetings, Strategic Business Reviews, and quarterly earnings preparation.

What We’re Looking For:

Bachelor’s or master’s degree (or equivalent); major in Business, Finance, or related field preferred.

5 - 7 years of experience within investment banking, management consulting, corporate development or corporate strategy.

Skilled at communicating strategic narratives clearly and simply in PowerPoint. Strong slide design capabilities and exceptional attention to detail required.

Self-motivated worker with experience developing organic and inorganic business strategies and financial models with modest manager guidance.

Expertise in analyzing financial results, including historical detailed revenue and expense due diligence to build out of flexible forward-looking financial models in Excel.

Strong analytical skills, including the ability to analyze data, draw conclusions and make recommendations to senior stakeholders.

Collaborative team player with effective written and verbal communication skills

Interested and aware of market trends with the ability to explain how events impact our business.

Proactive, with an innate sense of urgency and accountability; able to deliver results with short lead-times

About S&P Global Market Intelligence

At S&P Global Market Intelligence, a division of S&P Global we understand the importance of accurate, deep and insightful information. Our team of experts delivers unrivaled insights and leading data and technology solutions, partnering with customers to expand their perspective, operate with confidence, and make decisions with conviction.

For more information, visit www.spglobal.com/marketintelligence.

What’s In It For You?

Our Mission:

Advancing Essential Intelligence.

Our People:

We're more than 35,000 strong worldwide—so we're able to understand nuances while having a broad perspective. Our team is driven by curiosity and a shared belief that Essential Intelligence can help build a more prosperous future for us all.From finding new ways to measure sustainability to analyzing energy transition across the supply chain to building workflow solutions that make it easy to tap into insight and apply it. We are changing the way people see things and empowering them to make an impact on the world we live in. We’re committed to a more equitable future and to helping our customers find new, sustainable ways of doing business. Join us and help create the critical insights that truly make a difference.

Our Values:

Integrity, Discovery, Partnership

Throughout our history, the world's leading organizations have relied on us for the Essential Intelligence they need to make confident decisions about the road ahead. We start with a foundation of integrity in all we do, bring a spirit of discovery to our work, and collaborate in close partnership with each other and our customers to achieve shared goals.

Benefits:

We take care of you, so you can take care of business. We care about our people. That’s why we provide everything you—and your career—need to thrive at S&P Global.

Our benefits include:

Health & Wellness: Health care coverage designed for the mind and body.

Flexible Downtime: Generous time off helps keep you energized for your time on.

Continuous Learning: Access a wealth of resources to grow your career and learn valuable new skills.

Invest in Your Future: Secure your financial future through competitive pay, retirement planning, a continuing education program with a company-matched student loan contribution, and financial wellness programs.

Family Friendly Perks: It’s not just about you. S&P Global has perks for your partners and little ones, too, with some best-in class benefits for families.

Beyond the Basics: From retail discounts to referral incentive awards—small perks can make a big difference.

For more information on benefits by country visit: https://spgbenefits.com/benefit-summaries

Global Hiring and Opportunity at S&P Global:

At S&P Global, we are committed to fostering a connected and engaged workplace where all individuals have access to opportunities based on their skills, experience, and contributions. Our hiring practices emphasize fairness, transparency, and merit, ensuring that we attract and retain top talent. By valuing different perspectives and promoting a culture of respect and collaboration, we drive innovation and power global markets.

Recruitment Fraud Alert:

If you receive an email from a spglobalind.com domain or any other regionally based domains, it is a scam and should be reported to reportfraud@spglobal.com. S&P Global never requires any candidate to pay money for job applications, interviews, offer letters, “pre-employment training” or for equipment/delivery of equipment. Stay informed and protect yourself from recruitment fraud by reviewing our guidelines, fraudulent domains, and how to report suspicious activity here.

-

Equal Opportunity Employer

S&P Global is an equal opportunity employer and all qualified candidates will receive consideration for employment without regard to race/ethnicity, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, age, disability, marital status, military veteran status, unemployment status, or any other status protected by law. Only electronic job submissions will be considered for employment.

If you need an accommodation during the application process due to a disability, please send an email to: EEO.Compliance@spglobal.com and your request will be forwarded to the appropriate person.

US Candidates Only: Know Your Rights: Workplace discrimination is illegal

-

20 - Professional (EEO-2 Job Categories-United States of America), BSMGMT202.1 - Middle Professional Tier I (EEO Job Group)

Cadila Pharmaceuticals Ltd

Brand: Research & Development
Job Status: Job Status: 1
Description
Major purpose of the Job : -As a primary role Medical writing activities for BE and CT studies includes Preparation of Protocol, ICF, CRF and Clinical study report and as a secondary role pharmacy related activities of BE and CT studies. -Submission of BE study documents to Regulatory department for BE NOC/ T license and IEC for its approval. Responsibilities: Medical Writer: -Preparation of Protocol and its Amendments for BE studies. -Preparation of ICF and CRFs for BE studies. -Preparation of Phase I, II & III Synopsis, Protocol, Protocol Amendments, ICF and CRFs for CT studies. -Preparation and Compilation of CSR for BE studies and eCTD of study report as per specific guidelines. -Designing of Pharmacokinetic time points/feasibility for BE studies. -Implementation of revisions on guidelines for medical writing and Preparation of SOP. IEC submission activities. -Submission of Protocol and other documents to regulatory department for DCGI NOC/ T license. -Handling of regulatory agency deficiencies. Pharmacist: - Management of BE and CT pharmacy. - Handling of IP including receipt, storage, dispensing, & retention of Investigational Product. - Preparation of labels related to IP handling. - Temperature data monitoring. - Archiving of all pharmacy temperature data & logbooks. -Any other additional activities assigned by Head of the department.

employer.briefDescription: We don't just make history -- we make the future. We believe in serving our customers, our communities, and the world. If you do, too, come move the world and make the future with us.

description.text:
Job ID
63077
Category
Marketing & Sales
Location
Chennai, India
Work Type
Hybrid

We invite applications for Deputy Manager - Delivery & Web Content to serve as the Champion for Ford of Europe ‘Build and Price’ platform, leading the engagement between our European Markets and the Central FoE team. The role sits at the center of market stakeholders, tech teams, product architects, and product managers—navigating market-specific nuances to ensure precise delivery of requirements across our Passenger and Commercial Vehicle portfolios.

This position owns market engagement end-to-end, driving requirement clarity, stakeholder alignment, governance cadence, and market signoffs. It also leads to market and business-owner escalations, ensuring communication stays transparent, actions are time-bound, and closures are delivered with confidence. Ensuring Europe’s rigorous emission standards and diverse market regulations are accurately represented on websites is a core expectation of the role, enabled through the GPRS application and Enterprise Architect. A high standard of operational excellence is required to keep workstreams stable, minimize incidents, and sustain strong business satisfaction.

As the primary lead, you bring together FBS Market Leads, Central EU teams, and regional business stakeholders, including joint venture partners—to maximize platform uptime across 17 markets. This includes ensuring continuous service availability and pricing precision for a portfolio of 300+ models. Rigorous governance is maintained across the end-to-end information pipeline, so every customer interaction remains seamless and fully compliant with EU emissions and legal mandates. Strong visual and data integrity is critical to safeguarding Ford’s digital reputation and optimizing the journey for every visitor.

Beyond strategic oversight, the role leads a high-performing execution team operating across complex data ecosystems such as PAM, GPRS, and BSL. Delivery orchestration with key agency partners (WPP VML, Oliver) is essential, along with rapid incident resolution and close synchronization with IT, Product, and JV stakeholders to ensure flawless go-to-market execution for new program launches.Job Responsibilities:

Additional Responsibilities:

· Lead technology and process modernization across reporting, analytics, and data workflows by adopting industry practices and automating manual activities; partner with Automation and Re-engineering teams to deploy scalable solutions.

· Establish an operating cadence for leadership through daily/weekly briefings, performance scorecards, and forward-looking forecasts—enabling decisions on capacity utilization, delivery health, and new business scalability, with transparent reporting and timely approvals.

· Mentor leads by coaching them on delivery governance, stakeholder management, and incident handling, while actively supporting market-to-FBS escalation management.

· Foster a motivated, inclusive day-to-day working culture that strengthens collaboration and accountability, reinforces high performance, and improves team engagement through.

· Ensure adherence to MCRP, SoX, and GAO requirements to sustain ‘Nil Comments’ audit status through updated checklists, complete audit trails, and execution of Business Continuity Plan (BCP) practice drills.

· Partner with the department head on day-to-day operations and leadership cadence, covering performance reviews, strategic upskilling, governance, talent development, and workflow optimization.

The minimum requirements we seek:

· Master’s degree (e.g., MBA, PGDM, MSBA) or an equivalent advanced degree.

· 8-10 Yrs of total experience in business operations management

· 3+ years of experience with leading and coaching team leaders (directly or

indirectly) by demonstrating standard methodologies in market engagement, program management & communication

· Candidate should have managed small-to-medium-sized teams

Our preferred requirements:

· Demonstrated leadership in managing significant projects and programs, overseeing cross-functional teams to ensure successful, timely, and delivery of business solutions.

· Ability to develop and execute roadmaps, manage market relationships, build partnerships, and proactively mitigate risks to enhance operational excellence and system integrity.

· Exceptional communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills to influence stakeholders at all levels and foster team alignment.

· Strong analytical and data-driven problem-solving skills, utilizing business intelligence (BI) tools for strategic insights.

· Deep understanding and practical application of various business operation and process management methodologies (e.g., Business Process Management/Reengineering, Theory of Constraints).

· PMP, Agile (CSM, SAFe), or other relevant delivery management certifications are highly desirable.

description.text:
Requisition Id:: 6381
Department: Plants & Equipments
Location:

Maharashtra, IN

Role Purpose
The incumbent to this role drives the end-to-end planning and execution of multiple P&E setups while optimising costs, to ensure delivery in line with quality/safety standards and raise red flags if machinery utilisation falls below defined standards, while liasoning with the operations team and government authorities for necessary approvals and troubleshooting major issues at the project site.
The role holder is responsible for obtaining financial approvals, define all types of schedule for maintenance and manage manpower requirements.
The focus is on driving the areas of P&E performance in terms of cost, quality and safety, people management, liasoning with the stakeholders, and troubleshooting major issues.
The incumbent is also expected to identify opportunities for process optimization based on ground realities.
Key Responsibilities
P&E Planning & Performance – Drive the scope for P&E finalised by the Head – P&E and the senior management. Define the work plan for the entire team which identify the sequence of activities needed to successfully complete all P&E activities at all project sites for the entire financial year. Define and obtain approval of the estimates and plans for the requirement and optimisation of resources- time, money, manpower, equipment etc.. for the entire annual cycle. Identify opportunities for process and cost optimization based on ground realities. Evaluate the quality of products and services provided by OEMs and vendors and ensure GRIL standards are maintained.
P&E Operations – Review the system and equipment utilization and identify the underlying deviations from the SOPs. Ensure that procurements are on time within budget and at the required level of quality and safety. Ensure zero breakdowns of machinery. Review preventive maintenance logs. Liaison with the relevant authorities for necessary project approvals. Ensure adherence to all statutory compliance as well as SOPs set by GRIL corporate office. Manage spares and dead stock within the P&E function at the project sites.
Stakeholder Management & MIS reporting – Liaison with the internal customers and relevant government officials to acquire necessary approvals. Apprise the team and senior management (Director – P&E and Head – P&E) about the progress and request support for providing necessary inputs for smooth operational execution. Establish a communication schedule to update stakeholders, including senior managers in the organisation on the progress of the project. Monitor and review any deviation from SOPs and apprise the Senior Management.
People management – Facilitate development and growth of direct and indirect reportees while keeping track of overall team employee engagement and attrition. Ensure all the employee grievances are handled in the appropriate manner.
Indicative Experience and Exposure
Diploma in Civil/ Mechanical/ Electrical with in handling construction projects

or

BE/B.Tech with 13-17 years experience or M.Tech with 12-16 years experience in handling construction projects
Experience in handling Highway construction projects of INR 500cr + value

description.text:
CK’s Ingredients is an ISO 22000:2018 and FSSAI-certified manufacturer of food ingredients — preservatives, emulsifiers, flavours, and bakery improvers — trusted by distributors, bakeries, and food manufacturers across India for over a decade.

*ABOUT THIS ROLE*

CK’s Ingredients is looking for an experienced and results-driven *State Head – Sales Manager* to lead its sales operations across Kerala. This is a senior leadership role where you will own the state’s revenue targets, lead a team of Brand Development and Sales Executives deployed district-wise across Kerala, and drive business growth through strong distributor relationships and key account management. You will report directly to the CEO and work in close coordination with the Managing Director.

*WHAT YOU WILL DO*

* Own and deliver Kerala’s monthly and quarterly sales targets across CK’s product range.
* Lead and manage a team of 1Brand Development and Sales Executives across all Kerala districts.
* Manage CK’s wholesale distributor network — strengthen existing partnerships and add new distributors.
* Build and maintain direct relationships with key bakery chains, food manufacturers, and institutional buyers.
* Develop and execute the state sales strategy in line with CK’s growth plans.
* Track competitor activity, monitor market trends, and share timely intelligence with the CEO.
* Report sales performance, team activity, and demand forecasts directly to the CEO.

*WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR*

* Graduate or MBA in Business Administration, Food Technology, or a related field
* 5–8 years of B2B sales experience in food ingredients, FMCG, bakery supplies, or related industries
* Proven track record of achieving sales targets at a state or regional level
* Experience managing wholesale distributor networks — mandatory
* Experience leading a field sales team — strongly preferred
* Fluent in Malayalam and English (mandatory); Hindi preferred
* Willing to travel extensively across Kerala
* Familiarity with FSSAI standards and food industry certifications is an advantage

*WHAT WE OFFER*

* Performance-linked incentives and annual bonuses
* Travel allowance and mobile reimbursement
* Direct reporting to the CEO with genuine decision-making authority
* Opportunity to build and lead the state sales function from the ground up
* Career growth into national sales leadership as CK’s expands across India and into GCC markets.

Job Type: Permanent

Pay: ₹50,000.00 - ₹60,000.00 per month

Benefits:
* Cell phone reimbursement

Work Location: In person

description.text:
*Job Title:* R&D Coordinator

*Location:* Pandesara, Surat
*Department:* Research & Development
*Reporting To:* R&D Head

Can Send CV or call on - *7861874358*

*Job Purpose*

To support and coordinate all Research & Development activities at Ascolite, ensuring smooth execution of product development, testing, documentation, and cross-functional collaboration with production, quality, and marketing teams.

*Key Responsibilities1. R&D Coordination & Execution*

* Assist in planning, scheduling, and tracking R&D projects
* Coordinate between R&D, production, QA, and procurement teams
* Ensure timely completion of product trials and developments

*2. Product Development Support*

* Support formulation and development of new products (adhesives, coatings, construction chemicals, etc.)
* Assist in lab trials, sample preparation, and testing
* Maintain records of formulations and experimental data

*3. Documentation & Compliance*

* Maintain proper documentation of R&D activities, reports, and SOPs
* Ensure compliance with industry standards and internal protocols
* Prepare technical documents, datasheets, and reports

*4. Testing & Quality Support*

* Coordinate testing of raw materials and finished products
* Work closely with QA team for validation and quality checks
* Track product performance and feedback

*5. Vendor & Material Coordination*

* Coordinate with suppliers for raw material samples
* Maintain inventory of lab chemicals and materials
* Ensure timely availability of required resources

*6. Data Management & Reporting*

* Maintain R&D database and project trackers
* Prepare periodic MIS reports for management
* Analyze data to support decision-making

*Key Skills & Competencies*

* Strong coordination and project management skills
* Basic knowledge of chemicals / adhesives / construction materials
* Good documentation and reporting skills
* Analytical thinking and problem-solving ability
* Proficiency in MS Excel, Word, and basic data tools
* Effective communication and cross-functional collaboration

*Qualifications*

* *Education:* B.Sc / M.Sc (Chemistry) or Chemical Engineering
* *Experience:* 1–4 years in R&D / Lab / Product Development (preferably in adhesives, chemicals, or manufacturing industry)

Pay: ₹30,000.00 - ₹32,000.00 per month

Work Location: In person

employer.name: Gates Corporation
employer.briefDescription: Driven by Possibility. Gates Corporation is a leading manufacturer of application-specific fluid power and power transmission solutions.

description.text:
Date: May 3, 2026

Location: Pune, MH, IN, 41051

Company: Gates Corporation

Are you inspired by challenging the status quo? Do you thrive in collaborative environments that drive results? If so, Gates could be for you.

Gates is a leading manufacturer of application-specific fluid power and power transmission solutions. We push the boundaries of material science to engineer solutions that continually exceed customer expectations.

Let's simplify it, think belts and hoses. Found in motorcycles, conveyor belts, cars, tractors, blenders, vacuum cleaners, bicycles, & 3D printers just to name a few. Because why not do it all?

Essential Duties and Responsibilities

Other duties may be assigned beyond the core functions listed below.

Oversee manufacturing operations ensuring alignment with company goals and production objectives.
Review forecasts; analyze key operational metrics such as labor, scrap, production efficiency, cost reduction, and product quality.
Determine current baseline departmental efficiencies and implement steps to monitor and improve through-put, waste, and downtime.
Take a leadership role when it comes to quality, assisting Quality personnel, making quality-related decisions and being responsible for all quality issues. Drive initiatives to improve quality.
Participate in the problem analysis determination and corrective action implementation of internal and external customer complaints.
Coordinating preventive and predictive maintenance programs to minimize downtime.
Maintain a safe work environment by enforcing safety regulations and guidelines. Encourage team members to prioritize safety and report any hazards, fostering an environment where safety is everyone’s responsibility.
Provide leadership to supervisors, support staff, and production personnel.
Lead hiring, training, onboarding, and retention initiatives for shop floor employees.
Drive continuous improvement initiatives across processes and workflows.
Partner with supply chain, quality, engineering, HR, and maintenance teams to ensure seamless operations.

The incumbent will also need to ensure:

Adherence to Gates code of conduct & ethics. Shall set an example as a role model for his team in areas of personal character, commitment, organizational and work habits.
To ensure compliance of HSE standards as stated in the policy in his area of work. As a responsible employee of the organization, he has to bring to the attention of the safety committee any unsafe practice/working conditions in the facility. Acts as part of the team coordinating engineering changes, product line extension, or new product launches to ensure timely and orderly material and production flow transitions.
Supervisory Responsibilities

The incumbent reports to Plant Head -Faridabad and Pune and supports him in all day-to-day operations to achieve the business objectives of the company. Production, Quality ,Maintenance, HSE and Continuous Improvement teams report into this role.

Requirements and Preferred Skills

QUALIFICATIONS: To perform this job successfully, an individual must be able to perform each essential duty satisfactorily. The requirements listed below are representative of the knowledge, skill, and/or ability required.

BE/ MBA (master’s will be preferable) in Engineering/Operations.
Must have a minimum of 8-10 years’ experience in Production.

REQUIRED SKILLS:

Proven leadership and management skills with the ability to optimize team performance and development.
Excellent communication, interpersonal and influencing skills.
Excellent analytical and problem-solving abilities.
Commercially and financially astute with experience of managing budgets.
Resilient, self-motivated and able to work well under pressure.
Technical knowledge products, process & product costing.
Excellent operations skills are required.
Ability to make decisions on the go in liaison with the relevant stakeholders.
This role requires a self-driven self-starter.
Recognize obstacles and implement solutions to drive positive results.
Must have a high degree of confidentiality and ethics.
Understands market dynamics as well as the legal and regulatory landscape.
Must have knowledge of the Oracle/SAP ERP system.

WHY GATES?

Founded in 1911 in Denver, Colorado, Gates is publicly traded on the NYSE. While we might operate in a vast amount of time zones we operate as 'One Gates' and have a common goal of pushing the boundaries of materials science. We invest in our people, bringing real-world experience that enables us to solve our customers' diverse challenges of today and anticipate those of tomorrow.

WORK ENVIRONMENT

Gates is an Equal Opportunity and is committed to ensuring equal employment opportunities for all job applicants and employees. Employment decisions are based upon job-related reasons regardless of race, sex, color, religion, age, disability, pregnancy, citizenship, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, protected veteran status, genetic information, marital status, or any other consideration defined by law.

  • Maintain a safe work environment by enforcing safety regulations and guidelines. Encourage team members to prioritize safety and report any hazards, fostering an environment where safety is everyone’s responsibility.
  • Provide leadership to supervisors, support staff, and production personnel.
  • Lead hiring, training, onboarding, and retention initiatives for shop floor employees.
  • Drive continuous improvement initiatives across processes and workflows.
  • Partner with supply chain, quality, engineering, HR, and maintenance teams to ensure seamless operations.

The incumbent will also need to ensure:

  • Adherence to Gates code of conduct & ethics. Shall set an example as a role model for his team in areas of personal character, commitment, organizational and work habits.
  • To ensure compliance of HSE standards as stated in the policy in his area of work. As a responsible employee of the organization, he has to bring to the attention of the safety committee any unsafe practice/working conditions in the facility. Acts as part of the team coordinating engineering changes, product line extension, or new product launches to ensure timely and orderly material and production flow transitions.

Supervisory Responsibilities

The incumbent reports to Plant Head -Faridabad and Pune and supports him in all day-to-day operations to achieve the business objectives of the company. Production, Quality ,Maintenance, HSE and Continuous Improvement teams report into this role.

Requirements and Preferred Skills

QUALIFICATIONS: To perform this job successfully, an individual must be able to perform each essential duty satisfactorily. The requirements listed below are representative of the knowledge, skill, and/or ability required.

  • BE/ MBA (master’s will be preferable) in Engineering/Operations.
  • Must have a minimum of 8-10 years’ experience in Production.

REQUIRED SKILLS:

  • Proven leadership and management skills with the ability to optimize team performance and development.
  • Excellent communication, interpersonal and influencing skills.
  • Excellent analytical and problem-solving abilities.
  • Commercially and financially astute with experience of managing budgets.
  • Resilient, self-motivated and able to work well under pressure.
  • Technical knowledge products, process & product costing.
  • Excellent operations skills are required.
  • Ability to make decisions on the go in liaison with the relevant stakeholders.
  • This role requires a self-driven self-starter.
  • Recognize obstacles and implement solutions to drive positive results.
  • Must have a high degree of confidentiality and ethics.
  • Understands market dynamics as well as the legal and regulatory landscape.
  • Must have knowledge of the Oracle/SAP ERP system.

WHY GATES?

Founded in 1911 in Denver, Colorado, Gates is publicly traded on the NYSE. While we might operate in a vast amount of time zones we operate as 'One Gates' and have a common goal of pushing the boundaries of materials science. We invest in our people, bringing real-world experience that enables us to solve our customers' diverse challenges of today and anticipate those of tomorrow.

WORK ENVIRONMENT

Gates is an Equal Opportunity and is committed to ensuring equal employment opportunities for all job applicants and employees. Employment decisions are based upon job-related reasons regardless of race, sex, color, religion, age, disability, pregnancy, citizenship, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, protected veteran status, genetic information, marital status, or any other consideration defined by law.

description.text:
We established in 2007 a renowned group of 18 companies headquartered in Lucknow. We are working in such a big industries like Retail, Pharma, FMCG, Microfinance,Credit Cooperative, Insurance, Real estate etc and operate in 28 states and two union territories across india. We have over 150 offices across India and over 2,500 employees.

Tentative Job Location:- ANY CITY of *BIHAR or JHARKHAND* or UTTAR PRADESH

*"APPLY OR CALL ONLY IF YOU ARE READY/AGREE TO APPLY ANY CITY OF THE ABOVE STATES ON COMPANY CHOICE."*

Job role and responsibilities:-

* Accomplishes marketing and sales staff objectives by recruiting, selecting, training, and coaching employees.
* Communicates job expectations by planning, monitoring, and reviewing job contributions.
* Achieves objectives by creating marketing and sales strategies.
* Prepares and completes the marketing action plan.
* Meets financial objectives by forecasting requirements and preparing annual budgets.
* Determines annual and gross-profit plans by forecasting and developing annual sales quotas for regions.
* Accomplishes marketing and sales objectives by planning, developing, implementing, and evaluating advertisements.
* Identifies marketing opportunities by understanding consumer requirements.
* Improves product marketability and profitability by researching, identifying, and capitalizing on market opportunities.
* Sustains rapport with key accounts by making periodic visits.
* Collects, analyzes, and summarizes data and trends.

Work experience, skills and qualification:-

* Minimum *5-7 years* of Sales, Marketing & Business Development & team handling experience in multiple financial and banking products like Insurance, Loan, Credit Cards etc.
* Bachelor's or *MBA* - Marketing.
* Fluent in speaking in *English*.
* Organization, Leadership and time-management skills.
* Prospecting & Digital marketing skills.
* Product knowledge & Project management skills.
* Problem-solving and Interpersonal skills.

Salary and benefits:- Rs.30,000-60,000/- pm *(negotiable)* + Incentives + TA + DA + PF + others.

Interview will held *only in F2F medium *in Business days at 04:00 - 05:00 PM at Lucknow Head Office.

Contact:- Ranjeet K. Rawat (+91) 9838088855

Pay: ₹30,000.00 - ₹60,000.00 per month

Benefits:
* Cell phone reimbursement
* Commuter assistance
* Internet reimbursement
* Provident Fund



Application Question(s):
* ARE YOU AGREE TO RELOCATE IN ANY DISTRICT OF BIHAR or JHARKHAND or U.P. ?
* ARE YOU AGREE TO ATTEND F2F INTERVIEW AT LUCKNOW HO WITHIN 1-3 DAYS AFTER APPLYING ?

Education:
* Bachelor's (Required)

Experience:
* Sales, Marketing & team handling in INSURANCE or BANKING pro: 6 years (Required)

Language:
* English (Required)

Work Location: In person

description.text:
About Rentokil PCI

Rentokil PCI is the leading pest control service provider in India. A Rentokil Initial brand, Rentokil PCI was formed in 2017 through a joint venture (JV) between Pest Control India, the number one pest control company in India, and Rentokil, the world’s leading pest control brand. Rentokil PCI aims to set new standards for customer service having operations across 300 locations in India.

For more details: https://www.rentokil-pestcontrolindia.com

About the Role:

 The incumbent will report to the Territory Manager. The incumbent will have to work as part of a multi-functional team and this involves collaboration with the internal team and external stakeholders.

Job Responsibilities:
Sales & collection
 Achieving sales targets & collection targets.
 Keep a close watch on outstanding and implement strict credit policy within 30 days time.

Market relations
 Building up good distribution network and ensure team work
 Providing market infrastructure and being in regular touch with the market/customer.
 Distributor appointment and their staff training
 SWOT analysis of Market and distributor.
 Updating product knowledge and constant learning.
 Motivating the distributor/sales men for better market coverage.
 Regular reviews with distributor/sales men for achieving the desired goals.
 Building up a good distribution network.
 Good communication with retailers/customers.
 Complete the daily call report immediately after market work on the same day.
 Merchandising and a close watch on redistribution.
 Be presentable and always wear a uniform and carry an ID card.
 Carry samples of products and required brochures.

Sales promotion
 Utilization of sufficient POP material, brochures, posters etc. and display of the same in the market.
 Helping the distributor in liquidation of stocks and implementation of company Trade schemes, participation in exhibitions / product promotions / customer awareness programmes.
 Plan for budgets and schemes for sales promotion and ensure maximum returns.
 Inventory management of the distributor & settlement of distributor claims.
 Visit of farmer and his fields for exploring and promotion of Bio-products.
 Regular visits to hospitals, industries, panchayats/municipal corp. for promotion of Industrial products.
 Collect the order from Dealer/ Distributor / Institution on their letterhead/ Order format with clear payment terms.

Key role
 Close monitoring of his distributor indents and execution.
 Identify & explore new market segments and development of new areas.
 Constant touch with key and institutional customers.
 Maintain Good relations with Govt. departments
 Attend the customer complaints and help them in solving their problem.
 Constantly on the lookout for newer business opportunities
 Ensure all trade schemes are all operated properly by Distributor.

Focus areas
 Ensure profitability on each case to case
 Reduce damaged stocks and market returns.
 Analysis of competitor activities /Market information and send the report to the company.
 Minimise the outstanding and fast recovery of amounts from markets
 Positive attitude/honest/punctual and well disciplined.

Admin related responsibilities
 Comply all govt. Licenses/Sales permissions/other Govt. rules.
 Ensure proper documentation and updating of records related to sales & collections. Monthly analysis of the sales data for better results.
 Cost control and self financial discipline.

Key Result Areas:
 Achieve the sales & collections targets.
 Credit control.
 Distributor/Retailer expansion as per plan
 Ensure market secondaries
 Reduce market returns and damages.
 Implement tasks defined by branch head, including daily activity reporting

Competencies (Skills essential to the role):

 Distributor/Dealer management skills

 Excellent communication skills

 Sales pitching of all existing and new products

 Ability to deliver sales & collections under pressure situations

 Team player & ensuring good working relation with team & reporting manager

Educational Qualification / Other Requirement:

 Graduate / PG in any field

 if under graduate, candidate needs to have proven track record in sales field

Interested candidates can share resume on alfeeya.siddiqui@rentokil-pci.com
Contact - 9322881417

We are working in such a big industries like Retail, Pharma, FMCG, Microfinance,Credit Cooperative, Insurance, Real estate etc and operate in 28 states and two union territories across india. We have over 150 offices across India and over 2,500 employees.

Please call to apply or to schedule an interview only if you agree to all the terms and conditions listed below and fulfill all the eligibility criteria. *कृपया आवेदन करने या इंटरव्यू शेड्यूल करने के लिए तभी कॉल करें, जब आप नीचे दी गई सभी शर्तों और नियमों से सहमत हों और सभी पात्रता मानदंडों को पूरा करते हों।*

* Post or Designation:- Branch Manager
* Job Locations:- Any district of Bihar OR Jharkhand OR Uttar Pradesh *बिहार या झारखंड या उत्तर प्रदेश का कोई भी ज़िला*

Terms & Conditions*\* *for applying:-

* Tentative districts (Job Location) can't be declare before selection of candidate. *उम्मीदवार के चयन से पहले संभावित ज़िलों (नौकरी के स्थान) की घोषणा नहीं की जा सकती।*
* The candidates do not have the facility to choose of locations; they must be agree to relocate in any district of any state mentioned above. *उम्मीदवारों के पास नौकरी के स्थान चुनने की सुविधा नहीं होगी; उन्हें ऊपर बताए गए किसी भी राज्य के किसी भी ज़िले में जाकर काम करने के लिए सहमत होना होगा।*
* No candidate will be posted at their home state or home district. *किसी भी उम्मीदवार को उसके अपने गृह राज्य या गृह ज़िले में तैनात नहीं किया जाएगा।*
* The candidate will have to bear the costs of accommodation and meals themselves; however, the company will assist in making the necessary arrangements. *उम्मीदवार को रहने और खाने का खर्च खुद उठाना होगा; हालाँकि, कंपनी ज़रूरी इंतज़ाम करने में मदद करेगी।*
* The interview will be conducted strictly face-to-face; no virtual interviews will be held. Therefore, candidates must agree to appear for the interview at the Head Office located in Lucknow, U.P., within 1–2 days of applying. *इंटरव्यू पूरी तरह से आमने-सामने (face-to-face) होगा; कोई वर्चुअल इंटरव्यू नहीं लिया जाएगा। इसलिए, उम्मीदवारों को आवेदन करने के 1-2 दिनों के भीतर, लखनऊ, U.P. में स्थित हेड ऑफिस में इंटरव्यू के लिए उपस्थित होने पर सहमत होना होगा।*

Require work experience, qualification & skills:-

* *FRESHER* or min 1-2 year of Sales & Business Development of *INSURANCE POLICIES* or other INVESTMENT products.
* Bachelor's degree or *MBA-Finance & Marketing *will prefer.
* Good verbal skills in English.
* Confidence and Pleasant Personality.
* Presentation skills.

Job role & responsibilities:-

* Managing the overall performance of the branch.
* Developing strategies to achieve sales and revenue targets.
* Being responsible for the training and development of the team.
* Taking steps to ensure customer satisfaction and retention.
* Managing the branch's operations to run smoothly.
* Being responsible for budgeting and financial management.
* Implementing company policies and procedures.
* Evaluating team members' performance and providing feedback.
* Planning for the growth and development of the branch.
* Coordinating with senior management.
* Skills : Pleasant Personality, Good Communication, Presentation skills

Salary:- *Rs.20,000 – Rs.25,000/-* (negotiable) + incentive + PF + others.

description.html:
We established in 2007 a renowned group of 18 companies headquartered in Lucknow. We are working in such a big industries like Retail, Pharma, FMCG, Microfinance,Credit Cooperative, Insurance, Real estate etc and operate in 28 states and two union territories across india. We have over 150 offices across India and over 2,500 employees.

Please call to apply or to schedule an interview only if you agree to all the terms and conditions listed below and fulfill all the eligibility criteria. कृपया आवेदन करने या इंटरव्यू शेड्यूल करने के लिए तभी कॉल करें, जब आप नीचे दी गई सभी शर्तों और नियमों से सहमत हों और सभी पात्रता मानदंडों को पूरा करते हों।

  • Post or Designation:- Branch Manager
  • Job Locations:- Any district of Bihar OR Jharkhand OR Uttar Pradesh बिहार या झारखंड या उत्तर प्रदेश का कोई भी ज़िला

Terms & Conditions* for applying:-

  • Tentative districts (Job Location) can't be declare before selection of candidate. उम्मीदवार के चयन से पहले संभावित ज़िलों (नौकरी के स्थान) की घोषणा नहीं की जा सकती।
  • The candidates do not have the facility to choose of locations; they must be agree to relocate in any district of any state mentioned above. उम्मीदवारों के पास नौकरी के स्थान चुनने की सुविधा नहीं होगी; उन्हें ऊपर बताए गए किसी भी राज्य के किसी भी ज़िले में जाकर काम करने के लिए सहमत होना होगा।
  • No candidate will be posted at their home state or home district. किसी भी उम्मीदवार को उसके अपने गृह राज्य या गृह ज़िले में तैनात नहीं किया जाएगा।
  • The candidate will have to bear the costs of accommodation and meals themselves; however, the company will assist in making the necessary arrangements. उम्मीदवार को रहने और खाने का खर्च खुद उठाना होगा; हालाँकि, कंपनी ज़रूरी इंतज़ाम करने में मदद करेगी।
  • The interview will be conducted strictly face-to-face; no virtual interviews will be held. Therefore, candidates must agree to appear for the interview at the Head Office located in Lucknow, U.P., within 1–2 days of applying. इंटरव्यू पूरी तरह से आमने-सामने (face-to-face) होगा; कोई वर्चुअल इंटरव्यू नहीं लिया जाएगा। इसलिए, उम्मीदवारों को आवेदन करने के 1-2 दिनों के भीतर, लखनऊ, U.P. में स्थित हेड ऑफिस में इंटरव्यू के लिए उपस्थित होने पर सहमत होना होगा।

Require work experience, qualification & skills:-

  • FRESHER or min 1-2 year of Sales & Business Development of INSURANCE POLICIES or other INVESTMENT products.
  • Bachelor's degree or MBA-Finance & Marketing will prefer.
  • Good verbal skills in English.
  • Confidence and Pleasant Personality.
  • Presentation skills.

Job role & responsibilities:-

  • Managing the overall performance of the branch.
  • Developing strategies to achieve sales and revenue targets.
  • Being responsible for the training and development of the team.
  • Taking steps to ensure customer satisfaction and retention.
  • Managing the branch's operations to run smoothly.
  • Being responsible for budgeting and financial management.
  • Implementing company policies and procedures.
  • Evaluating team members' performance and providing feedback.
  • Planning for the growth and development of the branch.
  • Coordinating with senior management.
  • Skills : Pleasant Personality, Good Communication, Presentation skills

Salary:- Rs.20,000 – Rs.25,000/- (negotiable) + incentive + PF + others.

Contact:- Ranjeet K. Rawat (+91) 9838088855

Job Types: Full-time, Permanent, Fresher

Pay: ₹20,000.00 - ₹25,000.00 per month

Benefits:

  • Provident Fund

  • ARE YOU AGREE TO ATTEND INTERVIEW AT LUCKNOW, U.P.- HO WITH 1-3 DAYS AFTER APPLYING ?
  • ARE YOU ABLE TO RELOCATE WITHOUT ANY CONDITION IN ANY DISTRICT OF ANY STATE IN U.P. or JHARKHAND or BIHAR ?

Education:

  • Bachelor's (Required)

Experience:

  • Insurance sales or other investment products: 1 year (Preferred)

Language:

  • English (Required)

description.text:
About Rentokil PCI

Rentokil PCI is the leading pest control service provider in India. A Rentokil Initial brand, Rentokil PCI was formed in 2017 through a joint venture (JV) between Pest Control India, the number one pest control company in India, and Rentokil, the world’s leading pest control brand. Rentokil PCI aims to set new standards for customer service having operations across 300 locations in India.

For more details: https://www.rentokil-pestcontrolindia.com

About the Role:

● The incumbent will report to the Territory Manager. The incumbent will have to work as part of a multi-functional team and this involves collaboration with the internal team and external stakeholders.

Job Responsibilities:
Sales & collection
● Achieving sales targets & collection targets.
● Keep a close watch on outstanding and implement strict credit policy within 30 days time.

Market relations
● Building up good distribution network and ensure team work
● Providing market infrastructure and being in regular touch with the market/customer.
● Distributor appointment and their staff training
● SWOT analysis of Market and distributor.
● Updating product knowledge and constant learning.
● Motivating the distributor/sales men for better market coverage.
● Regular reviews with distributor/sales men for achieving the desired goals.
● Building up a good distribution network.
● Good communication with retailers/customers.
● Complete the daily call report immediately after market work on the same day.
● Merchandising and a close watch on redistribution.
● Be presentable and always wear a uniform and carry an ID card.
● Carry samples of products and required brochures.

Sales promotion
● Utilization of sufficient POP material, brochures, posters etc. and display of the same in the market.
● Helping the distributor in liquidation of stocks and implementation of company Trade schemes, participation in exhibitions / product promotions / customer awareness programmes.
● Plan for budgets and schemes for sales promotion and ensure maximum returns.
● Inventory management of the distributor & settlement of distributor claims.
● Visit of farmer and his fields for exploring and promotion of Bio-products.
● Regular visits to hospitals, industries, panchayats/municipal corp. for promotion of Industrial products.
● Collect the order from Dealer/ Distributor / Institution on their letterhead/ Order format with clear payment terms.

Key role
● Close monitoring of his distributor indents and execution.
● Identify & explore new market segments and development of new areas.
● Constant touch with key and institutional customers.
● Maintain Good relations with Govt. departments
● Attend the customer complaints and help them in solving their problem.
● Constantly on the lookout for newer business opportunities
● Ensure all trade schemes are all operated properly by Distributor.

Focus areas
● Ensure profitability on each case to case
●Reduce damaged stocks and market returns.
● Analysis of competitor activities /Market information and send the report to the company.
● Minimise the outstanding and fast recovery of amounts from markets
● Positive attitude/honest/punctual and well disciplined.

Admin related responsibilities
● Comply all govt. Licenses/Sales permissions/other Govt. rules.
● Ensure proper documentation and updating of records related to sales & collections. Monthly analysis of the sales data for better results.
● Cost control and self financial discipline.

Key Result Areas:
● Achieve the sales & collections targets.
● Credit control.
● Distributor/Retailer expansion as per plan
● Ensure market secondaries
● Reduce market returns and damages.
● Implement tasks defined by branch head, including daily activity reporting

Competencies (Skills essential to the role):

● Distributor/Dealer management skills

● Excellent communication skills

● Sales pitching of all existing and new products

● Ability to deliver sales & collections under pressure situations

● Team player & ensuring good working relation with team & reporting manager

Educational Qualification / Other Requirement:

● Graduate / PG in any field

● if under graduate, candidate needs to have proven track record in sales field

Interested candidates can share resume on alfeeya.siddiqui@rentokil-pci.com
Contact - 9322881417

description.text:
Job Title: Tally cum Sales Executive

Company: Usha Home Decor

Location: Bokaro Steel City / On-site

Department: Sales & Accounts

Reports to: Accounts Manager / Sales Head

About Us

We are a growing home decor brand dealing in bedsheets, cushion covers, curtains, table runners, quilts, and other soft furnishings. We sell through retail, wholesale, and online channels. To support our expanding operations, we need a multi-skilled team member who can handle both sales and accounts.

Role Overview

This is a dual role combining tele/field sales with Tally accounting. You’ll talk to customers to drive sales of our home decor products, while also managing daily billing, inventory, and basic bookkeeping in Tally. Ideal for someone who’s good with numbers and people.

Key Responsibilities

Sales Part - 60%

Customer Handling: Attend walk-in/telephone/WhatsApp inquiries for bedsheets, curtains, cushions, covers etc.

Order Processing: Explain product details like fabric, size, thread count, color variants, and close sales

B2B Coordination: Deal with retailers, hotels, interior designers for bulk orders and repeat business

Upsell/Cross-sell: Suggest matching cushion covers with curtains, or complete bedsheet sets

Payment Follow-up: Collect payments, track pending dues, share payment reminders

Stock Updates: Keep track of fast-moving designs and inform customers about new arrivals

Tally/Accounts Part - 40%

Billing: Generate sales invoices, GST bills, delivery challans in Tally Prime

Data Entry: Record daily sales, purchases, payments, receipts in Tally ERP 9 / Tally Prime

Inventory: Update stock in Tally, conduct physical stock checks, manage inward/outward entries

Banking: Handle cash, UPI, bank receipts and maintain day book

Reporting: Share daily sales report, outstanding report, stock report with management

GST Support: Help with E-way bills, basic GST filing data prep under CA guidance

Requirements

Experience: 1-3 years as Sales Executive / Accounts Assistant / Billing Executive. Textile or home decor background preferred

Tally Skills: Must know Tally Prime or Tally ERP 9 - billing, inventory, GST entries

Sales Skills: Good communication in Hindi & English, negotiation skills, customer-friendly attitude

Education: Graduate / 12th + Tally certification preferred

Tech: MS Excel, WhatsApp Business, basic email

Traits: Detail-oriented for accounts, confident for sales, honest with cash handling

What We Offer

Salary: ₹8,000 - ₹10,000month fixed

Growth: Exposure to both sales and accounts — path to Accounts Executive / Store Manager

Perks: Staff discount on all home decor products, annual bonus

Work Hours: 10:00 AM - 8:00 PM, Sunday fixed off

Training: Product training on fabrics, designs, and full Tally process training

Why This Role

Instead of two separate hires, you get to learn two core business functions. Perfect if you want to become a business manager or start your own shop later.

To Apply:

Send resume to or WhatsApp with subject “Tally cum Sales Executive - Home Decor” - 7004177658

Job Type: Permanent

Pay: ₹8,086.00 - ₹12,000.00 per month

Benefits:
* Paid sick time



Experience:
* Direct sales: 1 year (Required)
* Tally: 1 year (Required)

Work Location: In person
