description.text:
*Job Title: *Business Development Manager

*Summary:* We are looking for a high-impact *Business Development Manager* to spearhead our *SaaS and Product Sales* within the Indian domestic market. With 10–20 years of experience, the ideal candidate is a strategic hunter with a deep network in India’s enterprise and mid-market segments. You will be responsible for driving revenue growth, managing the localized sales lifecycle, and positioning our SaaS solutions as the gold standard for Indian and US businesses undergoing digital transformation.

*Responsibilities:*

* *Domestic Market Expansion India and US:* Develop and execute GTM strategies specifically for the *Indian geography*, targeting Tier 1 and Tier 2 cities.
* *Local Relationship Building:* Leverage existing networks to build strong relationships with *CTOs, CISOs, and Heads of Digital Transformation* across Indian enterprises.
* *Full Sales Cycle Management:* Lead the journey from initial prospecting and "cold-to-warm" outreach to high-stakes negotiations and final contract closures.
* *Product Evangelism:* Conduct deep-dive product demonstrations and POCs (Proof of Concepts) tailored to the specific regulatory and operational needs of Indian clients.
* *Ecosystem Networking:* Represent the company at major Indian tech forums (NASSCOM, TiE, etc.) and industry-specific summits.
* *Tender & RFP Management:* Manage the end-to-end process for RFPs/RFIs, ensuring compliance with Indian commercial and legal standards.
* *Team Leadership:* Mentor a local team of BDEs and Account Managers, fostering a culture of "customer-first" selling and high-velocity closing.

*Education/Qualifications:*

* *Academic Background:* Bachelor’s degree in Business, IT, or Engineering.
* *Preferred:* *MBA/PGDM* from a Tier 1/2 Business School in India.
* *Tools:* Mastery of *CRM tools* (Zoho, Salesforce) and Indian lead-generation platforms (Lusha, Apollo, LinkedIn).
* *Language:* Fluency in English and Hindi; knowledge of regional languages is a significant plus for South Indian market penetration.

*Experience:*

* *Tenure:* *10–20 years* in IT Sales/SaaS, with at least 5 years specifically focusing on the *Indian domestic market*.
* *Track Record:* Proven history of meeting or exceeding ₹5Cr+ annual revenue targets in the Indian software space.
* *Domain Expertise:* Deep understanding of the *Indian SaaS landscape*, Cloud services, and the "Digital India" ecosystem.
* *Negotiation:* Expert at navigating the price-sensitive nature of the Indian market while maintaining value-based margins.
* *Leadership:* Experience managing distributed sales teams across different Indian region

Pay: ₹1,000,000.00 - ₹2,000,000.00 per year

Benefits:
* Provident Fund



Application Question(s):
* Are you an Immediate Joiner?

Experience:
* Business Development Manager: 10 years (Required)

Work Location: In person
description.html:
Job Title: Business Development Manager

Summary: We are looking for a high-impact Business Development Manager to spearhead our SaaS and Product Sales within the Indian domestic market. With 10–20 years of experience, the ideal candidate is a strategic hunter with a deep network in India’s enterprise and mid-market segments. You will be responsible for driving revenue growth, managing the localized sales lifecycle, and positioning our SaaS solutions as the gold standard for Indian and US businesses undergoing digital transformation.

Responsibilities:

  • Domestic Market Expansion India and US: Develop and execute GTM strategies specifically for the Indian geography, targeting Tier 1 and Tier 2 cities.
  • Local Relationship Building: Leverage existing networks to build strong relationships with CTOs, CISOs, and Heads of Digital Transformation across Indian enterprises.
  • Full Sales Cycle Management: Lead the journey from initial prospecting and "cold-to-warm" outreach to high-stakes negotiations and final contract closures.
  • Product Evangelism: Conduct deep-dive product demonstrations and POCs (Proof of Concepts) tailored to the specific regulatory and operational needs of Indian clients.
  • Ecosystem Networking: Represent the company at major Indian tech forums (NASSCOM, TiE, etc.) and industry-specific summits.
  • Tender & RFP Management: Manage the end-to-end process for RFPs/RFIs, ensuring compliance with Indian commercial and legal standards.
  • Team Leadership: Mentor a local team of BDEs and Account Managers, fostering a culture of "customer-first" selling and high-velocity closing.

Education/Qualifications:

  • Academic Background: Bachelor’s degree in Business, IT, or Engineering.
  • Preferred: MBA/PGDM from a Tier 1/2 Business School in India.
  • Tools: Mastery of CRM tools (Zoho, Salesforce) and Indian lead-generation platforms (Lusha, Apollo, LinkedIn).
  • Language: Fluency in English and Hindi; knowledge of regional languages is a significant plus for South Indian market penetration.

Experience:

  • Tenure: 10–20 years in IT Sales/SaaS, with at least 5 years specifically focusing on the Indian domestic market.
  • Track Record: Proven history of meeting or exceeding ₹5Cr+ annual revenue targets in the Indian software space.
  • Domain Expertise: Deep understanding of the Indian SaaS landscape, Cloud services, and the "Digital India" ecosystem.
  • Negotiation: Expert at navigating the price-sensitive nature of the Indian market while maintaining value-based margins.
  • Leadership: Experience managing distributed sales teams across different Indian region

Pay: ₹1,000,000.00 - ₹2,000,000.00 per year

Benefits:

  • Provident Fund

Application Question(s):

  • Are you an Immediate Joiner?

Experience:

  • Business Development Manager: 10 years (Required)

Work Location: In person

description.text:
Location: Bhat,India
Category: Other
Cadila Pharmaceuticals Ltd
Job Code: 18013775
Brand: BSBU-HO
Job Status: Job Status: 1
Description
Major Purpose of the Job : (Exactly spell out key deliveries/results expected from this job): The jobholder shall be responsible for cascading the direction of SBU Head /HOD and providing appropriate leadership and direction to the field force in ensuring achievement of budgeted sales targets, implementation of marketing strategies, KOL strategies, pre-determined Dr call average, market penetration and MCR coverage by the field force. The jobholder along with HOD will devise action plans to improve the productivity and performance of each Field Staff through internal / external benchmarking Principal Tasks & Responsibilities: (Please write all the major jobs that the employee is required to carry out) 1. Achievement of Budgeted Targets  Achieve the budgeted sales targets and brand wise sales targets and growth targets for the respective geographical region in line with the divisional objectives  Achieve sales target with profit as budgeted  Achieve product mix as budgeted and market share as applicable to the therapy  Prepare Sales Plans, Forecast Plans and achieve weekly and monthly sales targets  Effective Intervention in low performance territories, low YPM territories through focused efforts (joint field work) of self and respective line managers  Ensure Business Hygiene parameters: Reduction of Expiries / Breakages, Nil Sales Return & Nil Cheque Bounce, Liquidation of stocks more than 90 days at C&F locations  Adherence to policies and implementation of activities as per company SOPs JOB DESCRIPTION  Ensure sales forecast and collection 2. . Team Building / Leadership & Direction  Address the competence and discipline requirements of field officers and managers through training, coaching & counseling  Field induction and training, coaching, and mentoring of reportees.  Support HOD in acting as an integrating mechanism between Marketing and Sales Teams and thereby ensuring proper team work and productivity  Support the HOD and Organization in achieving 100% deployment of field staff, improving retention of team members through effectively cascading inter departmental initiatives  Support the Organization in developing people and readying them for meeting Internal Promotion requirements 3. Effective Implementation  Ensure achievement of Key Performance Indicators like Dr. Call Average, MCR coverage, KOL coverage, YPM Parameter etc. of each field officer and each line manager  Implementation of company strategies  Study competition strategy and use it to tackle sales challenges  Ensure effective implementation of marketing strategies and / or programs by the field force in the region  Provide objective customer feedback on Marketing programs to HOD and PMT by gathering information from field and through self-observation during field work 4. Customer Management / KOL Management  Cascade and implement the KOL strategy  Improve ROI from KOLs through ensuring periodical visits by self and team 5. Product Management / Development  Development of 2 nd line brands into large contributors with economies of scale and high Market Share  Successful launch and establishment of new products by the field force  Be the ambassador for the company and set high levels of standards and professionalism

description.text:
Location: Bhat,India
Category: Other
Cadila Pharmaceuticals Ltd
Job Code: 18019086
Brand: BSBU-HO
Job Status: Job Status: 1
Description
Portfolio Analysis: Conduct "Gap Analysis" to identify molecules losing patent protection and assist in the commercial launch of "Day-1" generics. Trade & Channel Marketing: Develop promotional schemes for pharmacies and hospital procurement heads to ensure our brand is the "preferred generic" at the point of sale. AI-Driven Market Intelligence: Use AI search and social listening tools to track competitor pricing and supply disruptions in real-time. Regulatory Liaison: Collaborate with Regulatory Affairs to ensure all marketing collateral (LBLs, brochures) complies with the 2026 updated GxP and local advertising codes. CME & Engagement: Organize "Continuing Medical Education" (CME) webinars for doctors to reinforce the bio-equivalence and safety of our generic versions. Digital Front Door Management: Optimize our digital presence so that when HCPs or pharmacists search for a molecule, our product is the top-recommended, high-quality alternative.

description.text:
Location: Bhat,India
Category: Sales & Marketing Job
Cadila Pharmaceuticals Ltd
Job Code: 18017283
Brand: BSBU-HO
Job Status: Job Status: 1
Description
Principal Tasks & Responsibilities Key Responsibilities 1. Market Analysis & Strategic Planning  Scan and analyze the Indian Pharmaceutical Market (IPM) across therapies, customer segments, and market dynamics.  Identify new therapy segments, growth opportunities, and potential portfolio expansions in alignment with organizational vision.  Recommend strategic approaches for market entry and portfolio enhancement, securing approvals from senior leadership.  Monitor competitor initiatives and market trends to proactively address threats and opportunities. 2. Marketing Mix & Strategy Deployment  Design and implement effective marketing mix strategies for the division and therapy segments.  Develop high-quality project leads through superior marketing strategies and campaigns.  Forecast sales, market share, and performance indicators to guide strategy.  Sustain high-volume brands and successfully launch line extensions for second-line brands.  Implement pricing strategies and product differentiation to optimize profitability and growth.  Manage product portfolios across lifecycle stages (BCG matrix), ensuring resource allocation for maximum ROI.  Design integrated marketing communication plans to engage each customer segment effectively through field force. 3. Field Force Enablement & Execution  Ensure effective implementation of marketing strategies through field force with joint field work (18–20 days per quarter).  Train sales teams and product managers to execute promotional campaigns, brand messages, and marketing initiatives effectively.  Monitor campaign effectiveness and implement corrective actions at critical milestones. 4. Customer & KOL Development  Deploy and oversee KOL strategies, building a portfolio of 20–25 high-priority KOLs.  Engage in customer forums and key decision-making platforms to influence market dynamics.  Maintain regular market intelligence and ensure competitive strategies are addressed proactively. 5. Team Leadership & Development  Lead and mentor a team of therapy heads (GPMs) and Product Managers. JOB DESCRIPTION  Ensure optimal deployment of the team to achieve business, market share, and profitability goals.  Foster a high-performance culture with accountability, collaboration, and professional development. 6. Budget & Operational Controls  Plan and manage marketing budgets with focus on cost efficiency and ROI.  Ensure robust supply chain and inventory management to support marketing and sales initiatives.  Optimize resource allocation across brands, therapy segments, and lifecycle stages. Key Skills & Competencies  Strong strategic and analytical thinking  Deep knowledge of pharmaceutical therapies, brand management, and marketing principles  Expertise in lifecycle management, BCG portfolio strategy, and pricing strategies  Team leadership, mentoring, and cross-functional collaboration  Market research, competitor analysis, and KOL management  Excellent communication, presentation, and project management skills  Understanding of pharma compliance, ethics, and regulatory environment

description.text:
Location: Dholka,India
Category: Manufacturing Jobs
Cadila Pharmaceuticals Ltd
Job Code: 18014907
Brand: Manufacturing - Dholka
Job Status: Job Status: 1
Description
• Planning and Execution of all MMD-I & BPR preparation activity pertaining to Main Pharma Block, Cephalosporin Block, Penicillin Block & Rifampicin Block of Dholka, as well as Contract Manufacturing & Herbal. • Preparation and review of MMD-I & BPR of • Main Pharma Block • Cephalosporin Block • Penicillin Block • Rifampicin Block • Contract Manufacturing • Herbal • Initiate and review of change control, deviation & CAPA. • Preparation of SOP pertaining to functioning of the department. • Preparation of MMD-I & BPR of ANDA market. • Intra as well as inter department co-ordination with respect to preparation, review & approval of MMD-I & BPR. • To create ZFRT codes for Export market (Dholka, Jammu & Jammu2) in Master Data Management (MDM). • To create ZHLB code for Export & Domestic market (Dholka, Jammu & Jammu2) in Master Data Management (MDM). • To create & update BOM of ZHLB & ZFRT codes for Export & Domestic market in Master Data Management (MDM). • To co-ordinate with Production, SCM, QC, RA, Tax, Purchase, Finance & IT departments for SAP/MDM related issue. • Any other jobs assigned by Head QA. • Validation of computerized system as per regulatory requirement • Data integrity of computerized system • Prepare/Review/Revise SOPs related to computerized system validation. • Prepare/Review/Revise master validation plan for computerized system validation. • Prepare/Review/Approve validation deliverable related to CSV. • Periodic review of all GxP computerized system. • Monitoring User Account Management of GxP System. • Monitoring Data Backup, Archival and Restoration of GxP System. • Monitoring Inventory Management of GxP System. • Monitoring Information security Policy of GxP Systems. • Monitoring of PLC and Spreadsheet validation activity. • Monitoring activity related to IT SOPs. • To participate in Internal (Self inspection) and External audits. • To assist for any other assigned jobs from time to time. • To conduct the self-Inspection/ Date Integrity inspection of different departments. • Retain sample management and executed batch document • To ensure terminal Inspection of finished goods for export market dispatched from Dholka. • Responsible for Terminal Inspection of finished goods for export market dispatched from Dholka. • Responsible for terminal inspection of all LL products. • Responsible for sampling of all LL products for QC testing and retain sampling for LL Products. • Responsible for Retain sample management for MPB, Rifampicin, Herbal, and LL Products. • Responsible for executed BMR management. • Responsible to prepare Certificates of Conformance, Declaration and Approval letters as per requirement. • Responsible for timely perform periodical observed of retain sample. • Responsible to send BMR/BPR as per requirement of country wherever required. • Any job assigned time to time by seniors. • To look after smooth and proper functioning of the assigned job responsibilities. • To ensure for proper handling, issuance, retrieval, distribution and archival of quality documents, SOPs etc. • To ensure the PQR is prepared, reviewed and approved within the stipulated timelines. • To ensure cGMP related training program for all concerned manpower. • Responsible for assigning appropriate job responsibility to subordinate and train them for completion of activity in compliance with cGMP. • To assign JOB role/ TNI of subordinates in TIMS. • To generate final completion certificate for new joiners after completion of their training. • To review Change Control, Deviations and CAPA in LIMS. • Any other jobs assigned by Head QA. • Responsible for review, tracking and closing of deviation, change control and CAPA in LIMS. • Responsible for participating in investigation along with cross functional team to find out actual root cause of incident or deviation. • Responsible for review and assign number to Deviation, Change control, CAPA when required supporting documents is available in system. • To ensure the completion, closing and effectiveness of CAPA given to the different regulatory and customer audit. • Responsible to take follow up with cross functional team to approval & closing of deviation, change control, CAPA. • To check the effectiveness of implemented change control and CAPA as required. • Responsible for review of manufacturing investigation. • Responsible for handling of Market complaints. Perform investigation and report preparation. • Responsible for review of manufacturing investigation. • Responsible for preparation and review of Risk assessment. • Responsible for logging of conversion note. • Responsible for preparation of Trend analysis report for QMS records as per SOP. • Responsible for review change control, deviation and CAPA logs from system. • Responsible for handling of recall procedures. • To prepare and revise the departmental SOP and ensure training to all concerns. • To perform mock recall and documented all the activity within timeline as mention in the schedule. • To assist for any other jobs assigned from time to time. • Responsible for FAR handling and sharing investigation report for register market complaints. • To Perform Vendor Audits for Vendor Qualification as per requirement of RM/PM. • Perform effective self-inspection as per schedule and ensure timely closing with proper CAPA or justification for the noncompliance found during self-inspection. • To participate in all internal and external audits. • To prepare compliance report of different customer and regulatory audits. • To make sure that internal and external audit compliance report is prepared within given timeline.

description.text:
Location: Dholka,India
Category: Research & Development Jobs
Cadila Pharmaceuticals Ltd
Job Code: 18005591
Brand: CSBU
Job Status: Job Status: 1
Description
Major purpose of the Job : •To take key decisions in consultation with the management at various stages of an R&D project - right from product finalization to route selection to technology transfer. •To ensure that the projects falling under the goals purview are as per the plan – w.r.t Cost, Quality and adherence to Timelines. Responsibilities: •To advise the Cluster Heads / Group Leaders & other scientific staff in solving any critical synthetic/ analytical issues on a regular basis. •To ensure that the laboratory scale synthesis and validation reports are documented as per the standard operating procedures before piloting/ commercialization of the technology. •To review and update the progress on the on-going projects to the management in the form of monthly reports and departmental presentations for Review meetings. •To build-up the competency in selective area in chemistry. •To take key decisions during designing of synthetic strategies for molecules to be developed in chemical R&D for Regulated and Non-Regulated market. •To broadly supervise the development (process as well as analytical) of cost effective non- infringing routes for all molecules. •To supervise the preparation of the yearly process saving plan.

employer.briefDescription: Bharti Airtel Limited is a global telecommunications services company based in New Delhi, India. It across South Asia and Africa.

description.text:
Job Description

JOB DESCRIPTION

Born in 1995, Airtel aims to offer global connectivity and unlock endless opportunities. Our presence is positioned to serve nearly 96% of the nation's population with infrastructure to sustain cutting-edge technologies such as 5G, IoT, IQ, and Airtel Black. At Airtel, we strive to go beyond our duties to create impactful solutions for consumers, while also preserving the ecological balance.

We create impact, take early ownership, and experiment with different career paths as part of our cultural fabric. Here’s what you will get to experience as an Airtel employee:

Limitless Impact:

You get to make a difference to internal and external customers by taking small and big ideas to success and therefore leaving footprints at the scale of billions. And beyond. Limitless Ownership:

You get to go above and beyond to take responsibility, challenge the norms and take risks to create big things in more ways than one. Limitless Careers:

You have the freedom to imagine, and an open canvas available to you to experiment and implement new ideas to gain depth and breadth of experiences.

So come join us, and #BeLimitless. Because you are.

Job Details

Job Title Store Manager – Sales

Designation Store Manager

Job Code

Function D2C

Sub-Function Sales

Location

Level/Grade Senior Executive / Executive

Position Description

The purpose of this role is to manage the Airtel store and ensure successful running of its operations. Additionally, the role requires maintaining compliance with agreed guidelines in order to deliver best in class experience and managing store revenue & cost targets.

Organizational Relationship

Reporting To Regional Head (~ Zonal Own Retail Manager)

Total number of employees supervised by you DIRECTLY or INDIRECTLY

Managerial Individual Contributors

Directly – –

Indirectly – –

Key Responsibilities & Accountabilities

Store Operations:

Manage & ensure the operations are in line with pre-defined SOPs with the look and feel of the store as per guidelines / standards.

Control inventory levels, conduct regular stock checks, and coordinate with the supply chain for optimal product availability.

Oversee visual merchandising efforts, ensuring that product displays and store layouts are appealing and on-brand.

Effectively track transactions and budgets for store operations, ensuring cost-effectiveness and financial targets are met.

Implement security measures and loss prevention strategies to safeguard inventory and assets.

Accountable for clearing store for formal launches across dimensions and during refit & conversion.

Customer Experience:

Implement processes to enhance the overall customer experience, customer satisfaction, and issue resolution.

Ensure an outstanding in-store customer experience, including product knowledge, assistance, and issue resolution, fostering customer loyalty.

Implement KPIs to monitor and evaluate the success of store operations, providing regular reports to senior management.

People Management

Lead retail staff, providing guidance, coaching, and performance feedback to ensure a high level of customer service and sales effectiveness.

Anchor trainings as required for team member development on product knowledge, sales techniques, and best practices.

Collaborate with central functions such as marketing, finance, and HR to ensure alignment with broader company policies and to maintain integration of in-store & online operations.

Knowledge, Certifications and Experience

Education Qualification Full time graduate degree, MBA / PGDM (optional)

Total Experience 4+ years of experience in retail business operations role

Key Interactions

Internal / External Stakeholders

(Internal means – External to the department and internal to the organization; External means – External to the organization)

Internal Zonal / Area Sales Managers & Field Sales Executives

External Channel Partners

Skills and Competencies

Technical Competencies

Proficiency in retail operations and S&M techniques

Basic knowledge of MS Office: Excel, PowerPoint, Word & Outlook

Leadership and Behavioural Competencies

Process Orientation

Influencing Personality

Communication Skills (oral/written)

Interpersonal Skills

Teamwork and Collaboration

Result Orientation

Customer Obsession

Positive Drive and Energy
Job Snapshot
Updated Date
02-05-2026
Job ID
Job_10320
Department
DTC
Location
AS-Tezpur-Ketikibari, Sonari, Assam, India
Experience
3 - 5 Years
Employee Type
Employee

description.text:
*Job Summary*

The QA & QC Head will be responsible for leading and managing all Quality Assurance and Quality Control functions to ensure compliance with regulatory requirements, company standards, and customer expectations. The role involves overseeing quality systems, audits, product quality, and continuous improvement initiatives.

*Key ResponsibilitiesQuality Assurance (QA):*

* Ensure implementation and maintenance of QMS (Quality Management System)
* Handle regulatory audits (WHO, USFDA, MHRA, etc.)
* Approve SOPs, validation protocols, and reports
* Monitor Change Control, Deviations, CAPA, OOS, OOT
* Ensure compliance with GMP, GLP, and regulatory guidelines
* Review and approve Batch Manufacturing Records (BMR) & Batch Packing Records (BPR)
* Conduct internal audits and vendor audits
* Lead data integrity and compliance initiatives

*Quality Control (QC):*

* Oversee all QC lab activities (Raw Material, In-process, Finished Goods testing)
* Ensure calibration and maintenance of instruments
* Review analytical reports and COAs
* Ensure compliance with pharmacopeial standards (IP, USP, BP)
* Manage stability studies and documentation
* Ensure proper documentation and lab practices

*Leadership & Management:*

* Lead, train, and develop QA & QC teams
* Drive continuous improvement and quality culture
* Coordinate with production, R&D, and regulatory teams
* Ensure timely product release and dispatch

*Key Skills & Competencies*

* Strong knowledge of GMP, GLP, and regulatory requirements
* Experience in handling regulatory audits (WHO, USFDA preferred)
* Strong leadership and team management skills
* Excellent documentation and analytical skills
* Problem-solving and decision-making ability

*Qualifications*

* B.Pharm / M.Pharm / M.Sc (Chemistry or relevant field)
* Additional certifications in Quality/Regulatory preferred

*Experience Required*

* 12–20 years of experience in QA/QC
* Minimum 5+ years in leadership role
* Experience in pharmaceutical / manufacturing industry preferred

*Salary & Benefits*

* As per industry standards
* Additional perks: [Insert if any]

*Why Join Us*

* Growth-oriented environment
* Exposure to regulatory audits
* Leadership role with high impact

Job Type: Permanent

Pay: ₹70,000.00 - ₹90,000.00 per month

Benefits:
* Flexible schedule
* Provident Fund

Work Location: In person

Job Location:- Jharkhand OR Uttar Pradesh OR Bihar (any city of any state) *झारखंड या उत्तर प्रदेश या बिहार (किसी भी राज्य का कोई भी शहर)*

* No virtual Interview will held only in face to face medium in Lucknow head office only with in 1-3 days after applying. *वर्चुअल इंटरव्यू नहीं होगा; इंटरव्यू सिर्फ़ लखनऊ के हेड ऑफ़िस में आमने-सामने (face-to-face) ही होगा, जो आवेदन करने के 1-3 दिनों के अंदर होगा*

* Min *6-7* years of Sales & Marketing & team handling in *Insurance policies or Banking products.*

Skills set:-

* Prospecting skills, Digital marketing skills, Product knowledge,
* Project management skills, communication skills, Leadership skills,
* Organization and time-management skills, Problem-solving skills, Interpersonal skills

role and responsibilities:-

description.text:
*Job Title: Production Manager / Head (Food Manufacturing)*
Location: Alapakkam, Chennai
Days: 6 days/ week

*Job Summary:*
We are looking for an experienced Production Manager to oversee the entire food
manufacturing process, ensuring efficient production, quality control, and compliance with safety standards while managing 2 shifts across the production line. The ideal candidate will have strong leadership skills, technical expertise, and the ability to optimize processes to maximize efficiency and profitability.

*Key Responsibilities:*
1. Production Planning & Execution

* Develop and implement production schedules meet demand.
* Monitor production KPIs and implement improvements
* Ensure minimal downtime and optimize production capacity.
* Manage and oversee daily production activities during two shifts.
* Ensure production schedules, raw material usage and targets are met efficiently.
* Identify and resolve any operational issues to prevent delays

2. Quality & Compliance Management

* Ensure strict adherence to food safety regulations (FSSAI, HACCP, GMP).
* Conduct regular inspections and audits to maintain product quality.
* Collaborate with the Management, Ordering & Admin teams to resolve quality issues.
* Own Daily, Weekly & Monthly Compliance for hygiene, safety, sanitation & maintenance

3. Team Management & Training

* Lead and manage production supervisors and floor staff.
* Develop and optimize the current R&R for production employees
* Assign tasks to workers and monitor performance.
* Train and develop team members to improve productivity.
* Foster a culture of accountability, teamwork, and continuous improvement.

4. Equipment & Maintenance Oversight

* Ensure proper functioning and maintenance of machinery.
* Coordinate with the maintenance team to minimize breakdowns.
* Implement preventive maintenance programs.

5. Inventory & Cost Control

* Monitor raw material and finished goods inventory levels.
* Work with the procurement team to ensure timely availability of materials.
* Optimize costs by reducing wastage and improving efficiency.

Job Type: Full-time

Pay: ₹35,000.00 - ₹60,000.00 per month

Work Location: In person

description.text:
*Job Summary:*

The Production & Quality Head is responsible for leading end-to-end manufacturing operations and quality functions in an Electronics Manufacturing Services (EMS) environment. This role ensures achievement of production targets, operational efficiency, product quality, customer satisfaction, and compliance with industry standards such as ISO, IPC, RoHS, ESD, and customer-specific requirements.

The role oversees production planning, SMT/PCB assembly operations, box build, testing, quality assurance, supplier quality, customer quality, and continuous improvement initiatives to drive zero-defect manufacturing and operational excellence.

*Key Responsibilities:*

1. Production Management

* Plan, organize, and monitor daily production operations to meet output and delivery targets
* Ensure effective utilization of manpower, machines, materials, and production capacity
* Oversee SMT lines, PCB assembly, box build, testing, and final assembly processes
* Improve productivity, reduce downtime, and optimize manufacturing efficiency
* Monitor OEE, cycle time, and production KPIs for continuous improvement

2. Quality Management System (QMS)

* Develop, implement, and maintain robust Quality Management Systems (QMS)
* Ensure compliance with ISO 9001, ISO 14001, IATF 16949 (if applicable), IPC standards, and customer requirements
* Lead internal audits, customer audits, and certification audits
* Drive CAPA (Corrective and Preventive Actions) and quality improvement programs

3. Incoming, In-Process & Final Quality

* Oversee IQC, IPQC, OQC, and final inspection activities
* Ensure PCB assemblies and finished products meet quality and reliability standards
* Reduce defects, rejection, rework, soldering failures, and testing failures
* Improve First Pass Yield (FPY) and reduce Cost of Poor Quality (COPQ)

4. Customer & Supplier Quality Management

* Handle customer complaints, RMAs, warranty issues, and field failures
* Lead 8D reports, root cause analysis, and corrective action implementation
* Conduct supplier audits and vendor quality improvement programs
* Improve supplier quality for PCBs, electronic components, and mechanical parts

5. Process Improvement

* Lead Lean Manufacturing, Six Sigma, Kaizen, and continuous improvement initiatives
* Implement SPC, process capability improvement, and reliability enhancement programs
* Improve process consistency, product reliability, and operational efficiency
* Drive cost reduction and waste elimination across operations

6. Team Leadership

* Lead production managers, QA/QC teams, reliability engineers, and supplier quality teams
* Set departmental KPIs and review team performance
* Conduct training, mentoring, and capability development programs
* Promote discipline, ownership, and high-performance culture

7. Compliance & Safety

* Ensure compliance with ESD, RoHS, REACH, EHS, and statutory safety requirements
* Maintain audit readiness and compliance documentation
* Coordinate with regulatory and certification bodies as required

Pay: ₹50,000.00 - ₹100,000.00 per month

Benefits:
* Cell phone reimbursement
* Provident Fund



Ability to commute/relocate:
* Sikandarabad, Uttar Pradesh: Reliably commute or planning to relocate before starting work (Preferred)

Experience:
* Electronics Manufacturing : 10 years (Required)

Work Location: In person

  • Develop, implement, and maintain robust Quality Management Systems (QMS)
  • Ensure compliance with ISO 9001, ISO 14001, IATF 16949 (if applicable), IPC standards, and customer requirements
  • Lead internal audits, customer audits, and certification audits
  • Drive CAPA (Corrective and Preventive Actions) and quality improvement programs

3. Incoming, In-Process & Final Quality

  • Oversee IQC, IPQC, OQC, and final inspection activities
  • Ensure PCB assemblies and finished products meet quality and reliability standards
  • Reduce defects, rejection, rework, soldering failures, and testing failures
  • Improve First Pass Yield (FPY) and reduce Cost of Poor Quality (COPQ)

4. Customer & Supplier Quality Management

  • Handle customer complaints, RMAs, warranty issues, and field failures
  • Lead 8D reports, root cause analysis, and corrective action implementation
  • Conduct supplier audits and vendor quality improvement programs
  • Improve supplier quality for PCBs, electronic components, and mechanical parts

5. Process Improvement

  • Lead Lean Manufacturing, Six Sigma, Kaizen, and continuous improvement initiatives
  • Implement SPC, process capability improvement, and reliability enhancement programs
  • Improve process consistency, product reliability, and operational efficiency
  • Drive cost reduction and waste elimination across operations

6. Team Leadership

  • Lead production managers, QA/QC teams, reliability engineers, and supplier quality teams
  • Set departmental KPIs and review team performance
  • Conduct training, mentoring, and capability development programs
  • Promote discipline, ownership, and high-performance culture

7. Compliance & Safety

  • Ensure compliance with ESD, RoHS, REACH, EHS, and statutory safety requirements
  • Maintain audit readiness and compliance documentation
  • Coordinate with regulatory and certification bodies as required

Pay: ₹50,000.00 - ₹100,000.00 per month

Benefits:

  • Cell phone reimbursement
  • Provident Fund

Ability to commute/relocate:

  • Sikandarabad, Uttar Pradesh: Reliably commute or planning to relocate before starting work (Preferred)

Experience:

  • Electronics Manufacturing : 10 years (Required)

Work Location: In person

description.text:
Job Title

(Regional Head Product DP & Trinity) Senior Manager Operations: Air product

Function

Operations

Reporting to

Regional Operations Head

1. Purpose

Responsible for overseeing the operations for the product category DP & Trinity and driving key performance metrics for the respective product category in the region

2. Key Responsibilities

Responsibilities

Financial

Ensure adherence to operational costs of the respective product categories in the region; Track Operating Costs per Movement (OCPM) and Operating Cost per Kilogram (OCPK) on a regular basis and take corrective actions, if any

Operational

Drive timely, accurate and profitable delivery of shipments to customers as per contractual terms and conditions for the respective product categories (DP & Trinity)
Oversee operations and track operational performance of the respective products in the region including daily inbound and outbound operations at Hubs / Service Centers / PUDs/ DCs
Work closely with the Service Center Heads / PUD Center Heads to analyze load patterns and review pick-up/delivery routes for first and last mile connectivity of the respective products
Work closely with the operations teams in the service centres/ PUDs responsible for delivery of the product for identification of any opportunities for process improvement / reengineering; Highlight the same to the Regional Operations Head and the Operations Efficiency and Quality Control team in the Corporate Office
Drive adherence to Standard Operating Procedures and Execution Excellence in the region for respective product categories(e.g. On-time delivery performance, Transit times, net service levels, SLAH, RTO reduction, timely connectivity onto the network, reduction in errors etc)
Drive safety and security of all shipments related to the product category in the region
Support national operations teams in network planning and design, network management, network optimization and efficiency enhancement initiatives for the respective product categories
Support Product Heads in new product development and improvement in existing products from an operational point of view

People

Provide direction, guidance and support to functional employees in the region to help them discharge their duties effectively
Monitor the performance of the team on a continuous basis to identify key performers
Mentor and coach subordinates to develop the team’s capabilities and build a robust succession pipeline

3. Key Result Areas and Key Performance Indicators

S.No

Key Result Areas

Key Performance Indicators

1.

Optimize costs in the region for the respective product categories (DP & Trinity)

% reduction in overall Operating Costs for the region (i.e. OCPK and PCPM)

2.

Reach Enhancement for the respective product categories (DP & Trinity)

Support in the expansion into Tier 2 and Tier 3 cities as per plan (through RSPs and BDEs)

Number of new Pin Codes added for the respective products

3.

Drive service quality and excellence for the respective product categories (DP & Trinity) in region

Overall service quality in the region for all products in terms of Net Service Levels (NSL)

Delivery performance as per transit times for the respective product categories

Adherence to SOPs (measured in terms of number of non-compliances/ deviations) in terms of delivery and information upload
* POD/ DC upload into system within defined timelines
* Consolidated bagging from Hub within defined targets

Achievement of target NPS Scores

4.

Ensure Security of Shipments for the respective product categories (DP & Trinity)

Number of open regional security related cases

5.

Ensure Regulatory Compliance for the respective product categories (DP & Trinity)

Compliance to all applicable regulatory requirements

6.

Drive Operations of Channel Partners for the respective product categories (DP & Trinity)

Operational Performance of
- RSPs
- PDAs
- Delivery Agents

7.

Drive Operations Process Efficiency and capability

% increase in operational productivity in region (measured as shipments/ employee or tonnage/ employee)

% coverage of employees - direct and indirect (as per plan) in region in terms of conduct of operations training programmes

8.

Ensure Performance Driven Culture

Adherence to Performance Management system timelines and guidelines

9.

Support Employee Capability Building

% Key positions within team with identified successors / potential successors

10.

Drive employee morale and engagement

Employee Attrition (%)

description.text:
KEY ACCOUNTABILITIES:

Understand and be a champion of DP World’s business and product strategy
Have a deep understanding, both low level and high level, across a swathe of technologies
Have built and helped build business systems from the ground up, and having scaled them
While being strategic, provide a very ‘Hands-on’ technical leadership and mentoring for engineers
Own the software design, architecture and operational excellence across the cargoes products
Work with product management and business heads to rapidly iterate on features and grow the business.
Actively seek to prevent redundancies, while allowing that where appropriate in order to accomplish an effective balance between short term and long term goals
Establish and promote software design and development guidelines, deployment strategies, best practices, and standards
Ensure the security-first approach during the design & development of applications
Adhere to all the DP World policies including information security
Responsible for the indirect management and leadership of an engaged team, promoting collaboration and ensuring that each is developed and evaluated against goals and objectives which are aligned, specific, measurable, attainable yet challenging, realistic and time bound.
Act as an ambassador for DP World at all times when working; promoting and demonstrating positive behaviors in harmony with DP World’s Founder’s Principles, values and culture; ensuring the highest level of safety is applied in all activities; understanding and following DP World’s Code of Conduct and Ethics policies
Perform other related duties as assigned

OTHER :

JOB CONTEXT:

DP World is a leading enabler of global trade and an integral part of the supply chain. We operate multiple yet related businesses – from marine and inland terminals, maritime services, logistics and ancillary services to technology-driven trade solutions.

We have a portfolio of 78 operating marine and inland terminals supported by over 50 related businesses in over 70 countries across six continents with a significant presence in both high-growth and mature markets. We aim to be essential to the bright future of global trade, ensuring everything we do has a long-lasting positive impact on economies and society.

Our dedicated team of nearly 100,000 employees from 110 countries cultivates long-standing relationships with governments, shipping lines, importers and exporters, communities, and many other important constituents of the global supply chain, to add value and provide quality services today and tomorrow.

Container handling is the company’s core business and generates more than three quarters of its revenue. In 2018, DP World handled 71 million TEU (twenty-foot equivalent units) across our portfolio. With its committed pipeline of developments and expansions, the current gross capacity of 90 million TEU is expected to rise to more than 100 million TEU by 2020, in line with market demand.

By thinking ahead, foreseeing change and innovating we aim to create the most productive, efficient and safe trade solutions globally.

QUALIFICATIONS, EXPERIENCE AND SKILLS:

Bachelors in Computer Science or related field from a reputed institution. Masters degree is a plus.
Around 15 years of experience in the software development field, working across a wide swathe of technologies
5-10 years of experience leading the architecture and design function in an organization, and managing enterprise architecture
Ability to take complex problems and simplify them elegantly. Meet time to market requirements of the business while not compromising software design principles.
Excellent communication, presentation, interpersonal and analytical skills, including the ability to communicate software choices and tradeoffs clearly and persuasively
Demonstrated ability to work collaboratively with stakeholders across multiple organizations and drive alignment
Ability to work efficiently and demonstrate a bias for action in a fast-paced environment, working on ambiguous and challenging projects
Relentless desire for innovation, balanced with business needs, and customer expectations
Experience with tools and standards of software development, testing, deployment and operational excellence

occupations.MGTWW: Business Management, Administrative & Customer Support Occupations

description.text:
We are looking for a dynamic and result-driven individual to join our team as a *PRO (Public Relations Officer) & Operational Head.*
*
*Key Responsibilities*:
Managing public relations and maintaining strong professional networks
*
Handling day-to-day operational activities efficiently
Fixing meetings with clients, partners, and stakeholders
Delivering impactful presentations
*
Ensuring smooth execution of tasks and getting work done on time
*
Understanding our products/services and positioning them effectively in the market
*
Identifying potential clients and business opportunities
Strategizing and executing plans to achieve organizational goals

* *Required Qualities:*

Presentable personality with strong communication skills
*
Talkative, confident, and persuasive
*
Smart thinker with problem-solving ability
*
Good understanding of operational management
Ability to take initiative and work independently
*
Compensation:
Salary will be performance-based
Earnings will be credited based on the candidate’s ability to generate and accumulate revenue from the market
What We Expect:
Clear understanding of our products and services
Ability to identify the right target audience
Strong execution skills to convert opportunities into results

We are 19 yr old group of company working in more than top 20 industries on Pan India basis, working in Credit Cooperative, IT, Banking & Microfinance Finance, FMCG, Insurance, Pharma, Retail, Real estate, Agriculture etc. with the fore of 2900 employees in ore than 750 branches over India.

Job Location*\**:- JHARKHAND or U.P. or BIHAR - ANY DISTRICT OF ANY STATE. *झारखंड या U.P. या बिहार - किसी भी राज्य का कोई भी ज़िला।*

Apply only and exclusively if you agree to all three of the following conditions and fulfill all eligibility criteria. *केवल तभी आवेदन करें, जब आप निम्नलिखित तीनों शर्तों से सहमत हों और सभी पात्रता मानदंडों को पूरा करते हों।*

Terms and conditions*\** for interview:-

* Candidates must be agree to relocating in any district of any state mention above as they don't have option to choose their preferred or home state or district. *उम्मीदवारों को ऊपर बताए गए किसी भी राज्य के किसी भी ज़िले में जाकर बसने के लिए सहमत होना होगा, क्योंकि उनके पास अपनी पसंद का या अपने गृह राज्य/ज़िले को चुनने का कोई विकल्प नहीं होगा*
* Candidate must be agree to bear the expences of fooding and loudging by its own as company will help to arrange the same but will not bear the expences. *उम्मीदवार को खाने और रहने का खर्च खुद उठाना होगा; कंपनी इसकी व्यवस्था करने में मदद तो करेगी, लेकिन खर्च नहीं उठाएगी।*
* The interview will not be held virtually in any condition, only F2F round will held at companies head office at Lucknow, U.P. where you have to be present within 2-3 days after applying or scheduling your interview. *इंटरव्यू किसी भी हाल में ऑनलाइन (virtually) नहीं होगा; केवल आमने-सामने (F2F) वाला राउंड ही कंपनी के लखनऊ, U.P. स्थित हेड ऑफिस में होगा। इसके लिए आपको आवेदन करने या इंटरव्यू शेड्यूल करने के 2-3 दिनों के भीतर वहाँ उपस्थित होना होगा।*

Work experience, educational qualification and skills:-

* *FRESHER* or 1 year in *sale of insurance policies or other investment* products.
* Min Bachelor's degree require but *MBA-Finance & Marketing *will preferred.
* Fluent in English and Hindi both languages.
* Communication, negotiation, confident and task oriented.

Job role & responsibilities:-

* Managing the overall performance of the branch.
* Developing strategies to achieve sales and revenue targets.
* Being responsible for the training and development of the team.
* Taking steps to ensure customer satisfaction and retention.
* Managing the branch's operations to run smoothly.
* Being responsible for budgeting and financial management.
* Implementing company policies and procedures.
* Evaluating team members' performance and providing feedback.
* Planning for the growth and development of the branch.
* Coordinating with senior management.

Salary:- Rs.20,000-25,000/- pm + Incentives + TA + DA + PF/ESIC + Others.

*Contact:- Ranjeet K. Rawat (+91) 9838088855*

Pay: ₹20,000.00 - ₹25,000.00 per month

Benefits:
* Provident Fund



Application Question(s):
* Are you able to relocate at any district of any state in BIHAR or jHARKHAND or U.P. ? 
* Are you agree to attend only face to face round of interview at Lucknow, U.P. head office ?

Education:
* Bachelor's (Required)

Experience:
* Sales of insurance policies or investment products ?: 1 year (Preferred)

Language:
* English (Required)

description.text:
Location: Bhat,India
Category: Sales & Marketing Job
Cadila Pharmaceuticals Ltd
Job Code: 18019087
Brand: BSBU-HO
Job Status: Job Status: 1
Description
Portfolio Analysis: Conduct "Gap Analysis" to identify molecules losing patent protection and assist in the commercial launch of "Day-1" generics. Trade & Channel Marketing: Develop promotional schemes for pharmacies and hospital procurement heads to ensure our brand is the "preferred generic" at the point of sale. AI-Driven Market Intelligence: Use AI search and social listening tools to track competitor pricing and supply disruptions in real-time. Regulatory Liaison: Collaborate with Regulatory Affairs to ensure all marketing collateral (LBLs, brochures) complies with the 2026 updated GxP and local advertising codes. CME & Engagement: Organize "Continuing Medical Education" (CME) webinars for doctors to reinforce the bio-equivalence and safety of our generic versions. Digital Front Door Management: Optimize our digital presence so that when HCPs or pharmacists search for a molecule, our product is the top-recommended, high-quality alternative.

description.text:
*ROLE AND RESPONSIBILITY*

1. Lead and manage the procurement team, ensuring performance and efficiency

2.Expand procurement categories using a strategic sourcing approach

3.Oversee procurement P&L, including cost control, budgeting, and cost optimization to improve margins

4.Handle sourcing and procurement of products, including imports and supplier negotiations

5.Review sales and inventory data to forecast demand and identify growth opportunities

6.Support new product introductions aligned with business strategy and assist in product development

7.Enhance procurement and import processes while ensuring compliance with regulations

8.Optimize costs, monitor supplier performance, and ensure consistent quality standards

9.Improve procurement and import workflows while ensuring compliance with applicable regulations

10.Define and track procurement KPIs to support overall business growth and profitability

11.Work closely with cross-functional teams to address operational challenges and ensure smooth business operations

*Mandatory Prerequisites:*

*Minimum 3 years Experience is required*

* Experience in consumer product purchasing
* Experience in handling procurement categories
* Ability to lead a team with KPI & KRA management
* Basic understanding of P&L, cost control, and budgeting
* Good understanding of inventory and demand planning
* Experience in vendor negotiation and sourcing (including imports)

Job Types: Full-time, Permanent

Pay: ₹40,000.00 - ₹60,000.00 per month

Benefits:
* Work from home



Experience:
* Purchasing: 3 years (Preferred)

Work Location: Remote

description.text:
*Job Title: Sales Head*

*Company: BastionEx India Technologies Pvt. Ltd.*

*Website: Businessbay.io*

*Location: Noida (Sector 4, Near Sector 16 Metro)*

*Experience: 6–10 Years*

*Working Days: 5.5 Days*

*\*Job Summary:\**

We are looking for a highly strategic and result-oriented Sales Head to lead and scale our sales operations for Businessbay.io. The ideal candidate will be responsible for driving revenue growth, building a high-performing sales team, and executing data-driven sales strategies aligned with business goals.

*\* Key Responsibilities:\**

Lead the overall sales function and drive revenue growth across channels

Design and implement scalable sales strategies and processes

Build, manage, and mentor a high-performing sales team

Set targets, track KPIs, and ensure consistent team performance

Drive high-value deal closures and key client acquisitions

Analyze market trends, competition, and identify new business opportunities

Strengthen client relationships and ensure long-term partnerships

Collaborate with marketing and product teams for business alignment

Oversee CRM management, reporting, and forecasting

*\* Requirements:\**

6–10 years of sales experience with at least 3+ years in leadership roles

Strong experience in team handling and revenue ownership

Excellent leadership, communication, and negotiation skills

Proven track record of achieving and exceeding sales targets

Strategic thinker with strong business acumen

Ability to thrive in a fast-paced, target-driven environment

Experience in B2B / IT / Digital Sales is highly preferred

*\* Preferred Skills:\**

Leadership & team scaling

Strategic sales planning

Client acquisition & retention

Revenue forecasting & pipeline management

Decision-making & problem-solving

*\* What We Offer:\**

Competitive salary + high-performance incentives

Leadership role with high growth potential

Dynamic and energetic work environment

Opportunity to shape and lead the sales vision

*Thanks & Regards*

*Srishti (HR)*

*srishti@bastionex.net*

*8477858611*

Job Type: Permanent

Pay: ₹80,000.00 - ₹100,000.00 per month

Benefits:
* Provident Fund

Work Location: In person

description.text:
*Job Description : Digital Marketing Executive*

*Position:* Digital Marketing Executive*Reports To:* Managing Director (Initially); Marketing Head (Future Transition)*Direct Reports:* None (Potential For Future Team Expansion)*Location:* Vijayawada Corporate Office *Employment Type:* Full-time (On-roll)

*Responsibilities*

* *Digital Brand Engagement:* Lead the Digital Presence for the brand, ensuring existing customers are engaged through digital platforms, primarily WhatsApp, followed by Instagram, Facebook, and other social media. Will be responsible for taking the brand to the market in a professional and engaging manner.
* *Lead Generation & Conversion:* Actively reach out to potential audiences to generate leads for the distributor network. Own the entire process of converting leads into opportunities and customers, ensuring digital efforts translate into business growth.
* *Operational Reporting:* Deliver comprehensive status updates on all digital activities, lead volume, and conversion metrics to the Managing Director on a daily, weekly, and monthly basis.
* *Campaign Management:* Support day-to-day digital marketing activities and execute campaigns to improve brand visibility. Coordinate the creation of content, including *reels, videos, creatives, and basic blogs*.
* *Platform Maintenance:* Update and maintain website content for products and offers. Perform *basic on-page SEO* and coordinate technical updates. Assist in monitoring paid digital campaigns, tracking spends, and performance metrics.
* *Cross-Functional Coordination:* Act as the primary liaison between the brand and the *distributor network*. Coordinate with sales and marketing teams for lead updates and work closely with designers, agencies, or vendors to ensure execution tasks are completed without delays.
* *SOP & System Implementation:* Design and implement *Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs)* for digital lead management. Improve efficiency through the use of automation tools and digital systems.

*Qualifications, Skills & Traits*

*Education:* MBA Specialisation in *Marketing* is mandatory. *Experience:* *2 to 3 years* of proven experience in a digital marketing or lead generation role. *Technical Skills:* High proficiency in Excel and Google Sheets is mandatory. Experience in lead generation, social media management, and customer conversion. Exposure to Meta Business Suite, WhatsApp Business API, and CRM software Familiarity with analytics and reporting tools. Strong execution mindset and high attention to detail. High ownership and accountability for lead conversion targets. Excellent coordination and communication skills to act as a bridge between the brand and the customer.

*Working Conditions*

*Work Model:* On-site (Vijayawada Corporate Office). *Number of Working Days:* 6 days per week. *Office Timings:* 9:00 AM – 7:00 PM*Holiday:* Sundays. *Travel:* *No travel required*; role is 100% office-based. *Environment:* Fast-paced, results-driven environment focused on brand expansion and lead conversion.

*Results and Growth Path*

*Success Metrics (Year 1):* *Accuracy:* Achieve *90% accuracy* across all lead tracking and conversion reporting. *Lead Generation:* Consistently meet monthly lead targets for the distributor network. *Task Efficiency:* Maintain a clear log of digital postings and lead follow-ups to ensure zero backlog. *Career Progression:* Digital Marketing Executive → *Senior Digital Marketing Executive* (1 to 2 Years) → *Digital Marketing Manager* (4 to 5 Years)

*Compensation*

*CTC:* 2.5 to ₹3.0 Lacs per annum *Probation Period:* 6 months (confirmed as a permanent employee upon successful completion). *Benefits:* Eligibility for Health Insurance after 2 years of continuous service.

*KRA & KPI: Lead Generation & Customer Conversion (100%)*

*S - Specific:* Coordinate with all stakeholders to execute digital strategies across WhatsApp, Instagram, and Facebook to generate leads for distributors and convert them into customers. *M - Measurable:90% accuracy rate* in lead tracking and conversion reporting. Zero instances of delays in reaching out to leads or updating the distributor network.

*A - Achievable:* Resources provided: Direct reporting line to the Managing Director, digital marketing tools, and coordination authority. *R - Relevant:* Directly supports the *sales growth and brand expansion* within the distributor network.

*T - Time-bound: *Daily/Weekly*:* Provide lead status and performance reports to the Managing Director, Monthly*:* Complete all monthly conversion targets and brand milestones.

*Analogy for the Role: Think of the Digital Marketing Executive as the Digital Bridge of the company. While the Operations team builds the "goods," you are the bridge that connects those goods to the customers. You ensure the bridge is always open, easy to find, and leads the customer safely to their destination, ensuring no one gets lost along the way.*

*Digital Marketing is what turns brand ambition into reality. This role ensures that the brand doesn’t just look good—it attracts, engages, and converts consistently, building the digital backbone for a brand designed to scale.*

Job Types: Full-time, Permanent

Pay: ₹9,874.25 - ₹30,000.00 per month

Benefits:
* Flexible schedule
* Paid sick time
* Provident Fund

Work Location: In person

description.text:
Role & Responsibilities
Financial operations-
* Oversee all financial operations, including accounting, budgeting, tax, and compliance.
* Bring in industry best practices for routine tasks
* Ensure accurate and timely financial reporting.
* Manage cash flow, treasury, and banking relationships.
* Analytics - Board and Function level MIS and Dashboards
* Publish monthly MIS for the CEO and the Board - providing company and business unit financial KPIs.
* Design and set up business dashboards such as customer-level profitability, business unit-level profitability, etc
* Assess the ROI of new and ongoing investments and give inputs to the CEO/ Business Unit heads for future investment planning and any course corrections needed.
Annual budgeting and forecasting-
* Lead the annual budgeting process and produce high-quality financial forecasts, by business unit to guide planning and investment decisions.
* Track budget vs actual performance and regularly report variances regularly to the CEO with suggested measures to improve metrics.
* Design systems to project financials and cash flows with a high degree of accuracy.
Pricing strategy-
* Review the existing pricing model and change prices or the entire structure in line with changing cost structures and competitive situations, in collaboration with sales, marketing and product teams.
* Incorporate inputs from the pricing meeting in the annual forecast and budgets and ensure healthy profitability across business units.
Risk Management and Compliance-
* Ensure compliance with financial regulations, and accounting standards, and establish internal controls.
* Statutory compliances and payments including but not limited to - TDS, GST, Income tax.
* Handling audits and other secretarial processes.
* P&L Management, Product-Wise Profitability & Budgeting/Cost Control
* Own and manage the full P&L with a focus on product-wise profitability. Drive budgeting, cost control, and margin improvement across business units.
Team Leadership-
* Build and lead a high-performing finance team.
* Foster a culture of accountability, collaboration, and continuous improvement.
* Provide mentorship and development opportunities for finance team members.
* Take this first step towards your dream career and an insane learning path.
* Every team member brings something unique to the table. Here’s what we are looking for with this role
description.html:
Role & Responsibilities
Financial operations-
  • Oversee all financial operations, including accounting, budgeting, tax, and compliance.
  • Bring in industry best practices for routine tasks
  • Ensure accurate and timely financial reporting.
  • Manage cash flow, treasury, and banking relationships.
  • Analytics - Board and Function level MIS and Dashboards
  • Publish monthly MIS for the CEO and the Board - providing company and business unit financial KPIs.
  • Design and set up business dashboards such as customer-level profitability, business unit-level profitability, etc
  • Assess the ROI of new and ongoing investments and give inputs to the CEO/ Business Unit heads for future investment planning and any course corrections needed.
Annual budgeting and forecasting-
  • Lead the annual budgeting process and produce high-quality financial forecasts, by business unit to guide planning and investment decisions.
  • Track budget vs actual performance and regularly report variances regularly to the CEO with suggested measures to improve metrics.
  • Design systems to project financials and cash flows with a high degree of accuracy.
Pricing strategy-
  • Review the existing pricing model and change prices or the entire structure in line with changing cost structures and competitive situations, in collaboration with sales, marketing and product teams.
  • Incorporate inputs from the pricing meeting in the annual forecast and budgets and ensure healthy profitability across business units.
Risk Management and Compliance-
  • Ensure compliance with financial regulations, and accounting standards, and establish internal controls.
  • Statutory compliances and payments including but not limited to - TDS, GST, Income tax.
  • Handling audits and other secretarial processes.
  • P&L Management, Product-Wise Profitability & Budgeting/Cost Control
  • Own and manage the full P&L with a focus on product-wise profitability. Drive budgeting, cost control, and margin improvement across business units.
Team Leadership-

description.text:
\**Preference will be given to those candidates who have experience in a similar service of Intergrated Facility Management /Housekeeping /Sanitation related work.*

Hiring an experienced E-Tender/E-Procurement/Government Tender/GEM Portal Manager with a strong background of sales through Government bids and tenders via GeM E-Procurement Portals. You should be skilled in updating product catalogs on GEM, preparing tender documents, and managing customer enquiries. Knowledge of MS Office, Google Sheets, and various bid submission methods and knowledge of pdf tools is required (Online & Offline).

Extensive knowledge of Gem Portal/E- tendering Portal.

* *Only Experienced Candidateds with Minimum 3-4 Years of Experience Will be Shorlisted for Interview. Only Apply if You Fullfill this Criteria.*
* Providing documentary support to our tender team & other dealers/distributors for tenders & other procurement channels.
* Tender specification screening for our in-house tender team & for other dealers.
* Product Preparation for tender demonstration in coordination with the service & sales team.
* Maintaining tender record/Installation record/Performance copies/Po copies etc.
* Technical Specification draft/amendment etc.
* Product Literature / Brochure design & Proofing support.
* All other miscellaneous technical documentation & support to the team in the absence of Product Manager/Business Head
* Detail understanding of data management, and data risk preferred
* Understanding of BG compliance policies and process
* Communicating with senior stakeholder to ensure compliance rates. You will need to regularly follow up with them through email, calls and F2F meetings.
* Understand/ analysis of current compliance process to brainstorm & suggest what can be improved.
* Coordinate with Finance and HR for cases and Employee data.

Data analytics for Operations team

* Support Ops Manager to create reports and Dashboards on Ops related areas
* Work with teams on gathering & cleaning info related to Administration

Other ad-hoc tasks for internal teams if required

PROFICIENCIES:

* Microsoft PowerPoint (Basic); Microsoft Word (Basic); Microsoft Outlook (Basic)
* Microsoft Excel (Advance) - Compliance report generation and weekly reporting.
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills that are compelling and persuasive, e.g., negotiating skillfully in tough situations, convincing others to act.

Job Types: Full-time, Permanent

Pay: ₹20,000.00 - ₹40,000.00 per month

Benefits:
* Health insurance



Ability to commute/relocate:
* Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh: Reliably commute or planning to relocate before starting work (Required)

Education:
* Bachelor's (Required)

Experience:
* Procurement: 1 year (Required)

Language:
* English (Required)

Work Location: In person

description.text:
Job Purpose:

To lead and drive revenue growth by developing strong sales systems, expanding market presence, generating new leads, managing key client relationships, and ensuring achievement of sales targets in the Ready Mix Concrete (RMC) segment.

Key Responsibilities:Sales Strategy & Target Achievement

* Develop monthly, quarterly & annual sales plans.
* Achieve revenue and volume targets (CUM sales targets).
* Expand market share in government & private projects.
* Monitor daily dispatch vs sales conversion ratio.
* Maintain healthy order pipeline. Lead Generation & Business Development
* Identify new contractors, builders, developers & infrastructure projects.
* Develop relationships with:
* Site Engineers
* Project Managers
* Purchase Heads
* Architects
* Consultants
* Ensure regular site visits & project tracking.
* Convert enquiries into confirmed orders.

CRM & Sales Process Management

* Ensure 100% CRM data entry by sales team.
* Track:
* Leads
* Follow-ups
* Conversion ratio
* Lost orders & reasons
* Maintain daily sales meeting reports.
* Monitor recovery & payment follow-ups.

Marketing & Brand Positioning

* Develop marketing strategies (online + offline).
* Coordinate:
* Social Media campaigns
* Contractor meets
* Site branding
* Promotional materials
* Strengthen premium positioning of company.
* Monitor competitor pricing & market trends.

Team Management

* Lead and supervise Sales Executives.
* Set KRAs & KPIs.
* Conduct weekly performance reviews.
* Train team on:
* Product knowledge
* Technical RMC knowledge
* Objection handling
* Payment negotiation

Customer Relationship Management

* Maintain strong relationships with top clients.
* Handle escalations professionally.
* Ensure repeat business.
* Improve customer satisfaction score.

Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)

* Monthly Revenue Target Achievement (%)
* CUM Dispatch Target Achievement
* New Client Acquisition
* Lead Conversion Ratio
* Outstanding Collection Period
* Repeat Order Ratio
* Market Share Growth

Qualification:

* MBA in Marketing / Sales preferred
* Bachelor’s degree required
* 5–10 years experience in Construction / RMC / Building Material industry

Skills Required:

* Strong negotiation skills
* Market intelligence
* Leadership & team management
* Communication (Hindi & English)
* CRM & reporting knowledge
* Commercial understanding (Pricing, Margin, GST basics)

Pay: ₹20,000.00 - ₹50,000.00 per month

Benefits:
* Health insurance

Work Location: In person

*What You Will Do:*

You will market this not just as a test, but as a *strategic decision-support tool* that empowers HR to identify leaders, reduce attrition, and align employee potential with company goals.

description.text:
Job description:

We are looking for a dynamic and results-driven *ASSISTANT MANAGER* to lead our branch operations and drive business growth. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in NBFC products such as personal loans, SME loans, vehicle loans, or gold loans, and a proven track record in sales, team management, and compliance.

*Key Responsibilities:*

* Achieve branch sales and revenue targets through effective business development.
* Manage and lead a team of sales officers and operations staff.
* Develop strong customer relationships and drive customer satisfaction.
* Ensure adherence to internal credit policies and RBI guidelines.
* Oversee loan processing, documentation, disbursal, and collections. Monitor portfolio health and take proactive steps to reduce NPAs.
* Prepare and submit MIS reports and branch performance data.
* Ensure overall branch compliance, security, and process efficiency.

*Requirements:*

* Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Business Administration, or related field (MBA preferred).
* 3–6 years of experience in NBFC/BFSI sector, with at least 1–2 years in a managerial role.
* Strong knowledge of retail lending, credit assessment, and collections.
* Proven ability to lead a team and achieve branch-level business targets.
* Excellent communication, leadership, and customer service skills.
* Familiarity with regulatory compliance and RBI norms.

*What We Offer:*

* Competitive salary + performance-based incentives
* Career growth opportunities in a fast-growing NBFC
* Comprehensive training and development programs

Pay: ₹15,000.00 - ₹45,000.00 per month

Benefits:
* Health insurance

Work Location: In person

Location- Raipur

Salary- 40-45K

Availability- Full-time

VsnapU, a leading player in the photography industry, is currently seeking a Business Development Manager to join our team in Raipur. As a Business Development Manager, you will be responsible for converting leads, generating revenue, managing a team, and evaluating performance. We are looking for individuals with a minimum of 3 years of experience in a similar role.

*Roles and responsibilities:*

-Take charge of converting leads into customers by effectively promoting our photography services and products.
-Meet sales targets and contribute to the overall revenue generation of the company -Lead and manage a team of sales executives.

-Oversee day-to-day operations, including scheduling, resource allocation, and workflow management.
-Ensure smooth and efficient functioning of the floor, optimizing resources and maintaining high-quality standards.

-Minimum of 3 years of experience in a similar role.

description.text:
About Intas

Recruitment Fraud Disclaimer:

Intas Pharmaceuticals does not request or accept any fees during recruitment. If someone asks for payment on our behalf, it is a scam. Please report the incident to the local police or cybercrime unit. Your trust and safety are important to us.

Intas is a leading global pharmaceutical company specializing in the development, manufacturing, and marketing of pharmaceutical formulations. The mission of the company is to address unmet medical and societal needs through a fully integrated pharmaceutical value chain spanning across the world.

Through its subsidiaries, the International presence of Intas includes the following countries: over 85 worldwide, with some of the more important global markets like North America, Europe, Latin America, and the Asia-Pacific under the well-known brand name Accord Healthcare. The rapid expansion has been due to organic growth and strategic acquisitions alone, vindicating its position in some of the important major pharmaceutical markets across the world.

Intas follows high standards of quality, as reflected by products approved for leading global regulatory agencies including USFDA, MHRA, and EMA. Substantial in-house R&D capability, along with the beginning of a focus on highly advanced areas like Biosimilars and New Chemical Entities-Intas continues to push the frontiers of excellence in healthcare.

At Intas, our success is fundamentally built on the strength of our people. Our ongoing commitment is to attract and retain the best talent in the industry while fostering an empowering environment that encourages innovation and excellence. This approach ensures that every employee plays a meaningful role in driving both the company’s growth and advancements in global healthcare.

Job Title: Sr. Research Associate -Accord - QA / RA
Job Requisitions No.: 16187
Job Description:
Competencies
Intas - Problem Solving

Intas - Dealing with Ambiguity
Intas - Customer Focus
Intas - Time Management

Skill Required

Relevant skills / Industry experience
Relevant professional / Educational background
Any other requirements (If any)
Compensation / Reward
Location:

Head Office, Ahmedabad, GJ, IN, 380054

Travel: 0%
Life at Intas Pharmaceuticals

For over three decades, Intas has thrived due to the exceptional talent of its people. Our growth is fueled by a dynamic environment that nurtures individual potential while fostering collaboration and collective success. We believe that when diverse skills and perspectives unite under a shared purpose and value system, we can achieve remarkable outcomes, driving innovation and excellence across the pharmaceutical landscape.

Date: 2 May 2026

Our growth is fueled by a dynamic environment that nurtures individual potential while fostering collaboration and collective success. We believe that when diverse skills and perspectives unite under a shared purpose and value system, we can achieve remarkable outcomes, driving innovation and excellence across the pharmaceutical landscape.

Date: 2 May 2026

description.text:
Here’s a *sample Job Description (JD)* for a *Sales Executive – Accounting Software Sales* role. You can customize it based on your company, target market, and seniority level.

*Job Title:* Sales Executive – Accounting Software Sales

*Location:* Vesu, Surat
*Department:* Sales Development
*Reports To:* Sales Head

*Job Summary:*

We are seeking a dynamic and results-driven *Sales Executive* to promote and sell our *accounting and financial management software* solutions. The ideal candidate will be responsible for identifying business opportunities, building strong client relationships, and driving sales growth by understanding customer needs and presenting the right software solutions.

*Key Responsibilities:*

* Identify and generate new business opportunities for the company’s accounting software through cold calls, networking, referrals, and online platforms.
* Conduct product demonstrations and presentations to prospective clients.
* Understand customer requirements and recommend suitable software modules or packages.
* Develop and maintain long-term relationships with clients to ensure customer satisfaction and retention.
* Achieve monthly, quarterly, and annual sales targets.
* Collaborate with the marketing and product teams to enhance customer engagement and support lead generation campaigns.
* Prepare proposals, quotations, and sales contracts.
* Stay updated with product knowledge, industry trends, and competitor offerings.
* Maintain accurate records of sales activities and client interactions in CRM systems.

*Key Skills & Competencies:*

* Proven experience in *B2B software sales*, preferably in *accounting, ERP, or fintech products*.
* Strong understanding of accounting principles and business processes.
* Excellent communication, negotiation, and presentation skills.
* Ability to work independently and manage multiple leads simultaneously.
* Strong problem-solving and analytical skills.
* Tech-savvy with proficiency in CRM tools and MS Office.

*Qualifications:*

* Bachelor’s degree in *Business Administration, Commerce, Marketing, Accounting, or related field*.
* 1–4 years of experience in software or SaaS sales (experience in accounting or ERP software preferred).
* Familiarity with cloud-based solutions and subscription sales models is a plus.

*Compensation:*

* Competitive salary plus performance-based incentives.
* Opportunities for growth and professional development.

Job Types: Full-time, Fresher

Pay: ₹15,000.00 - ₹30,000.00 per month

Benefits:
* Flexible schedule
* Internet reimbursement
* Leave encashment
* Paid sick time
* Paid time off
* Work from home

Work Location: In person
