description.text:
*Job Description — Head, Admissions and Sales*

Title: *Head – Admissions and Sales*

Department: Admissions / Sales and Marketing

Reports to: Director

*Role Summary:*

Responsible for end-to-end admissions revenue delivery through counseling team

management, process governance, conversion planning, and data-driven execution

while ensuring compliance, service quality, and brand reputation in the admission cycle.

*Key Responsibilities*

* Own yearly/quarterly admissions and revenue targets and conversion ratio.
* Build and manage counselling, tele-sales, lead-desk and program office teams.
* Monitor enquiry → lead → counselling → form → admission funnel.
* Ensure strict follow-up discipline, lead hygiene, and CRM usage.
* Plan and execute conversion campaigns with marketing and outreach teams.
* Conduct counsellor training on product, objection handling, and compliance.
* Governance of documentation, refund communication and policy adherence.
* Weekly MIS review with leadership and performance action plans.
* Coordinate with academic/finance/IT/marketing for smooth admissions ops.
* Handle escalations (student/parent) with professionalism.
* Drive SOP creation, audit, and continuous process improvements.

*Skills Required*

* Strong team leadership and target-driven mindset.
* Excellent counselling and negotiation skills.
* Command over data/MIS/CRM and funnel analytics.
* Knowledge of University/AICTE/UGC admissions norms.
* High discipline, communication and conflict management.

*KRA — Head, Admissions and Sales*

*KRA Category - KPI / Measurement Examples*

* *Target Achievement - * % Target achieved (Forms + Admissions + Revenue).
* *Conversion Funnel - * Lead→Form, Form→Admission conversion benchmarks.
* *Team Productivity - * Per counsellor productivity, attendance and quality KPIs.
* *Process Compliance - *CRM hygiene, refund/SOP adherence, zero audit deviations.
* *TAT and Escalation Handling - *Resolution time, zero negative escalation to management.
* *Training and Quality -* No. of training sessions, improvement in delivery scores.
* *Collaboration - *On-time coordination with Marketing/Outreach/Academics.
* *Reporting Discipline - * Weekly MIS accuracy, action plan and review discipline.

Job Type: Full-time

Pay: ₹500,000.00 - ₹1,000,000.00 per year

Work Location: In person

description.text:
*ROLE OVERVIEW*

Senior leadership role owning the full commercial P&L for AZCENTRIX — India's AI-powered HRMS, Payroll, and ERP SaaS platform. The Business Head drives revenue growth, manages key customer relationships, and bridges the gap between market needs and product development. Must be equally effective in presenting to CEOs and participating in sprint reviews with the development team.

*KEY RESPONSIBILITIES*

*Business Development & Revenue*

* Own go-to-market strategy for Tamil Nadu and Pan-India SME & mid-market

* Lead full sales cycle — lead generation to closure

* Build channel partner networks across Erode, Tirupur, Coimbatore, Salem, and Karur

* Hit monthly and quarterly revenue targets

*Customer Success*

* Primary escalation point and relationship owner for all accounts

* Conduct QBRs; drive upsell of ERP, CRM, HRMS modules

* Ensure onboarding from contract sign to go-live in under 3 weeks

*Product & Dev Coordination*

* Write structured BRDs and user stories for the dev team

* Participate in sprint planning; coordinate customer UAT

* Maintain product roadmap tracker across customer and dev teams

*Market Intelligence*

* Monitor and knowledge of major HRMS, CRM, VMS, CMS and other software

* Identify SME HRMS, CRM and other most likely white-space opportunities in India

*IDEAL CANDIDATE*

*Experience*

* 8–12 years in B2B enterprise software sales, product, and BD

* Minimum 3 years in HRMS, Payroll, ERP, or SaaS environment

* Proven track record closing B2B software deals independently

* Tamil Nadu SME / industrial sector experience is a strong plus

*Skills*

* Strong communication in Tamil and English

* Ability to write clear BRDs and business proposals

* Understanding of Indian HR processes — PF, ESI, TDS, labour law

* Data-driven pipeline management and sales forecasting

*Year 1 KPI Targets*

*30+ SME clients*

New Acquisitions

*₹5–10L MRR*

by Month 12

*90%+ Retention*

Customer Health

*4.2/5.0 CSAT*

Satisfaction

*20% of base revenue*

Cross-sell / upsell revenue

*3x quarterly target*

Pipeline coverage ratio

Job Types: Full-time, Permanent

Pay: From ₹800,000.00 per year

Benefits:
* Health insurance
* Provident Fund

Work Location: In person
